We develop an estimator that identifies demand complementarity and remains computationally feasible with large choice sets. We apply this estimator to the chips and soda market and find a high degree of complementarity between these product groups. We show that a counterfactual merger ignoring complementarity between PepsiCo/Frito‐Lay and Dr. Pepper generates price increases for soda that are 33% larger than a model with complementarity, and that post‐merger chip prices decrease when accounting for complementarity.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：标准的离散选择需求模型假设所有产品都是替代品。基于这些模型的合并分析可能会高估对消费者的伤害。我们开发了一种估计器，能够识别需求互补性，并且在面对大型选择集时仍具有计算可行性。我们将这种估计器应用于薯片和苏打水市场，发现这些产品组之间存在高度的互补性。我们展示了一个忽略百事公司/菲多利与Dr. Pepper之间互补性的反事实合并，会导致苏打水价格上涨33%，比考虑互补性的模型要大，并且在考虑互补性的情况下，合并后薯片价格会下降。

papers.title_en: Auctioning Off Budgets in Procurement
papers.title_zh: 拍卖预算在采购中的应用
papers.abstract_en: ABSTRACT This article investigates a multi‐unit pay‐as‐bid procurement auction where the auctioneer fixes total spending and maximizes the quantity procured with their predetermined, secret budget. Previous literature has analyzed fixed‐quantity auctions, where the traded quantity is fixed but unknown to the bidders. Compared to such auctions, budget auctions lower the auctioneer's costs by introducing an additional interaction between a bidder's bids; bidders not only weigh a higher profit margin on a unit against a lower probability of supplying that unit; a higher margin on some unit also reduces the probability that the budget suffices to procure more units from the bidder.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 本文研究了一种多单位支付-出价采购拍卖，其中拍卖人固定总支出，并利用其预定的秘密预算最大化采购数量。先前文献分析了固定数量拍卖，其中交易数量是固定的但对竞拍者来说是未知的。与此类拍卖相比，预算拍卖通过引入竞拍者出价之间的额外互动来降低拍卖人的成本；竞拍者不仅权衡单位利润率的提高与供应该单位的概率降低；某些单位上更高的利润率也降低了预算足以从竞拍者那里采购更多单位的概率。

papers.title_en: Content‐Hosting Platforms: Discovery, Membership, Or Both?
papers.title_zh: 内容托管平台：发现、会员制还是两者兼有？
papers.abstract_en: ABSTRACT Our model classifies platforms in the “creator economy” —for example, Youtube, Patreon, and Twitch—into three business models: pure discovery (helping consumers search for creators); pure membership (enabling direct creator–consumer monetization); and hybrid (combining both). Creators respond to platforms' decisions by choosing their content design along a broad‐niche spectrum, trading off between viewership size and per‐viewer monetization. With a monopoly platform, moving from pure discovery to hybrid increases profit while inducing a more niche content design; moving from pure membership to hybrid can reduce platform profit while inducing a broader content design. We show how intense platform competition reverses these trade‐offs.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 我们的模型将“创作者经济”中的平台——例如YouTube、Patreon和Twitch——分为三种商业模式：纯粹的发现（帮助消费者寻找创作者）；纯粹的会员制（使创作者与消费者之间的直接货币化成为可能）；以及混合型（结合了两者）。创作者通过在广泛-小众内容设计谱系中选择自己的内容设计来响应平台的决策，权衡观众规模和每位观众的货币化。在垄断平台的情况下，从纯粹的发现转向混合型可以增加利润，同时促使内容设计更加小众化；从纯粹的会员制转向混合型可能会减少平台利润，同时促使内容设计更加广泛化。我们展示了激烈的平台竞争如何逆转这些权衡。

papers.title_en: Rx‐to‐OTC Switch, Market Exclusivity, and Consumer Welfare: A Study of the US Anti‐Ulcer Drug Markets
papers.title_zh: 处方药转非处方药、市场独占权与消费者福利：美国抗溃疡药市场研究
papers.abstract_en: ABSTRACT We study the US Anti‐Ulcer Drug market, where market exclusivity is granted to the first over‐the‐counter (OTC) drug independent of prescription drugs' patent expiry. We show that due to the interplay of incentives in the prescription and OTC drug markets, compared to a world with no market exclusivity policy, the status quo design reduces consumer welfare by 1.6 billion USD, as it causes many firms to delay entry into the OTC drug market until prescription drug patents expire. An alternative policy linking OTC exclusivity provision to prescription drug patent expiry dates improves drug access and increases consumer welfare by 3.4 billion USD.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 我们研究了美国抗溃疡药物市场，该市场授予首个非处方（OTC）药物市场独占权，而不考虑处方药的专利到期。我们表明，由于处方药和OTC药物市场激励的相互作用，与没有市场独占政策的世界相比，当前的设计减少了16亿美元的消费者福利，因为它导致许多公司推迟进入OTC药物市场，直到处方药专利到期。将OTC独占权规定与处方药专利到期日相联系的替代政策可以改善药物获取并增加34亿美元的消费者福利。

papers.title_en: Price Setting on a Network
papers.title_zh: 网络定价
papers.abstract_en: ABSTRACT I study price setting within a network of interconnected monopolists. Some firms possess stronger commitment or bargaining power than others, enabling them to influence the pricing decisions of other firms. Although it is well‐understood that multiple marginalization reduces both total profits and social welfare, I show that strategic interactions within the network exacerbate the marginalization problem. Individual profits are proportional to a new measure of network centrality, defined by the equilibrium characterization. The results underscore the importance of network structure in policy considerations, such as mergers or trade policies.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：我研究了相互连接的垄断者网络中的价格设定问题。一些公司比其他公司具有更强的承诺力或议价能力，使它们能够影响其他公司的价格决策。尽管众所周知多重边际化会降低总利润和社会福利，但我展示了网络内的战略互动加剧了边际化问题。个体利润与网络中心性的新度量成正比，该度量由均衡特征定义。结果强调了在政策考虑中，如合并或贸易政策，网络结构的重要性。

papers.title_en: The Timing of New Technology Adoption: The Case of MRI
papers.title_zh: 新技术采纳的时机：以磁共振成像（MRI）为例
papers.abstract_en: ABSTRACT This paper studies the adoption of nuclear magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) by US hospitals. I consider a timing game of new technology adoption. The dynamic game takes timing decisions and strategic interaction into account. Using a panel data set of US hospitals, cross sectional variation in adoption times, market structure and demand is exploited to recover the profit and cost parameters. In counterfactuals, I quantify to what extent the timing of adoption is caused by a preemptive motive. I find a small but significant effect of preemptive motives, which are weakened by firm asymmetry.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 本文研究了美国医院采用核磁共振成像（MRI）的情况。我考虑了一个新技术采用的时间博弈。动态博弈考虑了时机决策和战略互动。利用美国医院的面板数据集，利用采用时间、市场结构和需求的横截面变化来恢复利润和成本参数。在反事实分析中，我量化了采用时机在多大程度上是由先发制人的动机引起的。我发现先发制人的动机有小但显著的影响，这种影响被企业不对称性所削弱。

papers.title_en: Contingent Prizes in Dynamic Contests
papers.title_zh: 动态竞赛中的或有奖励
papers.abstract_en: ABSTRACT Firms and government agencies increasingly use online contests to find solutions to problems. These contests allow players to make multiple attempts, and their progress is tracked on a real‐time public leaderboard. Although the contests are dynamic , contest sponsors miss the opportunity to dynamically shape players' incentives, as they award the entire prize pool based only on players' final rankings. We propose the use of contingent prizes that depend on the game's history to incentivize players throughout the contest. We present evidence from two methodologies—a structural model and an RCT—showing that contingent prizes can significantly improve contest outcomes.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：企业和政府机构越来越多地使用在线竞赛来寻找问题的解决方案。这些竞赛允许参与者进行多次尝试，并且他们的进步会在实时公共排行榜上被跟踪。尽管竞赛是动态的，但竞赛赞助商错过了动态塑造参与者激励的机会，因为他们仅根据参与者的最终排名来分配整个奖金池。我们提出使用依赖于游戏历史的或有奖金来激励整个竞赛过程中的参与者。我们从两种方法论——结构模型和随机对照试验（RCT）——提供的证据表明，或有奖金可以显著改善竞赛结果。

papers.title_en: Drip Pricing When Consumers Have Limited Foresight: Evidence from Driving School Fees
papers.title_zh: 消费者有限远见下的滴灌定价：来自驾校费用的证据
papers.abstract_en: ABSTRACT This article empirically examines the “drip” pricing behavior of firms, where consumers purchase a base product and may later buy an add‐on, often without anticipating the need for it. A loss leader pricing strategy emerges, with firms pricing the base product below, and the add‐on above, standalone levels. Using data from the Portuguese driving instruction market, we find that base course prices decrease with competition, while prices for add‐on repeat courses do not. A survey reveals that at least 25% of students are inattentive to repeat fees, driven by underestimating failure rates and being unaware of repeat test costs.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 本文实证检验了企业的“滴灌”定价行为，即消费者购买基础产品，并可能在之后购买附加产品，通常没有预见到对附加产品的需求。出现了一种亏损领导者定价策略，企业将基础产品的价格定在低于独立水平，而将附加产品的价格定在高于独立水平。利用葡萄牙驾驶指导市场的数据，我们发现基础课程的价格随着竞争而降低，而附加重复课程的价格则没有。一项调查显示，至少有25%的学生对重复费用不够关注，这是由于他们低估了失败率，并且不了解重复测试的成本。

papers.title_en: Endogenous Technology Spillovers in R&D Collaboration Networks
papers.title_zh: 内生技术溢出在研发合作网络中的作用
papers.abstract_en: ABSTRACT We introduce an R&D network formation model where firms choose both R&D efforts and collaboration partners. Neighbors in the network benefit from each other's R&D through technology spillovers, and there exists competition effects reflecting strategic substitutability in R&D. We provide a complete equilibrium characterization, and develop an estimation method that is computationally feasible for large networks. We then conduct an analysis of R&D collaboration subsidies, and find that a subsidy scheme targeting specific R&D collaborations can be more effective than a uniform subsidy, with a welfare gain up to five times larger than the cost of the subsidy.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 我们引入了一个研发网络形成模型，其中企业既选择研发投入，也选择合作伙伴。网络中的邻居通过技术溢出从彼此的研发中获益，并且存在反映研发中战略可替代性的竞争效应。我们提供了一个完整的均衡特征描述，并开发了一种对大型网络计算可行的估计方法。然后，我们对研发合作补贴进行了分析，发现针对特定研发合作的补贴计划可能比统一补贴更有效，其福利收益高达补贴成本的五倍。

papers.title_en: Legalization and innovation in the cannabis market
papers.title_zh: 大麻市场的合法化与创新
papers.abstract_en: How would legal institutions affect the rate and direction of innovation in restricted or illicit markets? This paper studies the impact of legalization on innovation in the cannabis market. We construct novel data and measures on cannabis-related innovation in clinical trials and patent applications at the state-year level. We use staggered difference-in-differences models and event studies to analyze the impacts of medical and recreational cannabis legalization (MCL and RCL, respectively) on innovation. We find no evidence that cannabis-related clinical trials respond to MCLs or RCLs. However, there is a marked increase in cannabis-related patenting ( ∼ 4.4 patents) in response to an RCL and more modest impacts from an MCL ( ∼ 1.4 patents). Notably, additional RCL-induced patents are focused primarily on downstream products and methods rather than upstream medical innovation; MCL impacts show a similar pattern. Our further analysis of patent content suggests significant growth in areas that may raise public health, safety, and misuse concerns. These results suggest that legalization increases innovation in the cannabis market, but with relatively weak gains in areas pertinent to health and safe use. We corroborate our findings with multiple new empirical methods in the literature.
papers.abstract_zh: 法律制度如何影响受限或非法市场中的创新速度和方向？本文研究了合法化对大麻市场创新的影响。我们构建了关于大麻相关创新的新数据和度量，包括临床试验和专利申请，以州-年为单位。我们使用交错差异-差异模型和事件研究来分析医疗和娱乐大麻合法化（分别称为MCL和RCL）对创新的影响。我们发现，大麻相关的临床试验对MCL或RCL没有反应。然而，对RCL的反应中，大麻相关的专利申请显著增加（约4.4项专利），而MCL的影响则更为温和（约1.4项专利）。值得注意的是，由RCL额外引起的专利主要集中在下游产品和方法上，而不是上游的医疗创新；MCL的影响显示出类似的模式。我们对专利内容的进一步分析表明，在可能引发公共卫生、安全和滥用问题领域有显著增长。这些结果表明，合法化增加了大麻市场的创新，但在与健康和安全使用相关的领域收益相对较弱。我们用文献中多种新的实证方法来证实我们的发现。

papers.title_en: Disruptive sustainability through digital innovations: Overcoming information asymmetries to benefit small-scale producers
papers.title_zh: 数字创新实现颠覆性可持续性：克服信息不对称以惠及小规模生产者

papers.title_en: When should firms watch for cross‐industry competition? A demand‐side perspective
papers.title_zh: 企业何时应警惕跨行业竞争？从需求侧的视角
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Research Summary Research on competitor identification has primarily focused on intra‐industry competition. However, cross‐industry competitive threats are prevalent and consequential. We adopt a consumer‐oriented perspective to examine how consumer perceptions shape de facto competition across industry boundaries. Drawing from social cognition theories, we introduce two mechanisms—cultural embeddedness and social salience—that lead consumers to perceive products in an emerging industry as viable substitutes for those in an established industry, thereby intensifying competitive pressures on established firms. We further hypothesize that the impact of these mechanisms varies across heterogeneous customer groups, specifically with respect to income, education, and immigration status. Event history analyses of Illinois movie theater failures during television's rise in 1944–1962 support our theorizing. Managerial Summary Identifying competitors can be a complex managerial task. While it often suffices to monitor only within‐industry competitors, unexpected cross‐industry rivals selling seemingly different products can create competitive blind spots. To identify cross‐industry competitive threats, we propose a demand‐based view to complement managerial perceptions: Do your customers view your offerings as interchangeable with emerging products? We find that when an emerging industry's products embody cultural elements borrowed from the established industry's offerings or resonate better with public discourse, customers are likely to perceive substitutability and switch to the emerging products. However, this tendency varies among customers with different profiles, making it essential to recognize which customer segments are more vulnerable when facing cross‐industry competition.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 研究总结 竞争对手识别研究主要集中在行业内竞争。然而，跨行业竞争威胁普遍存在且具有重大影响。我们采用以消费者为导向的视角，考察消费者感知如何塑造跨行业界限的实际竞争。借鉴社会认知理论，我们引入了两种机制——文化嵌入和社会显著性——导致消费者将新兴行业的产品视为对成熟行业产品的可行替代品，从而加剧了对成熟企业的竞争压力。我们进一步假设这些机制的影响在不同客户群体中有所不同，特别是与收入、教育和移民身份有关。1944-1962年电视兴起期间伊利诺伊州电影院倒闭的事件历史分析支持了我们的理论。管理总结 识别竞争对手可能是一个复杂的管理任务。虽然通常只需监控行业内竞争对手就足够了，但销售看似不同产品的意外跨行业竞争对手可能会造成竞争盲点。为了识别跨行业竞争威胁，我们提出了一个基于需求的观点来补充管理感知：你的客户是否认为你的产品与新兴产品可以互换？我们发现，当新兴行业的产品体现了从成熟行业产品中借鉴的文化元素，或更好地与公共话语产生共鸣时，客户可能会感知到可替代性并转向新兴产品。然而，这种倾向在不同客户档案中有所不同，这使得认识到哪些客户细分在面对跨行业竞争时更脆弱变得至关重要。

papers.title_en: A new organizational structure database: Examining structure through top management team compositions
papers.title_zh: 新型组织结构数据库：通过高层管理团队构成审视结构
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Research Summary Studies using archival organizational structure data are not as prevalent as one might expect for such a critical strategy topic. We seek to facilitate more studies in this domain by introducing a novel, hand‐collected dataset of top management team compositions of S&P 500 firms between 1993 and 2020. Alongside providing the original role titles, we use generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) to categorize executives' titles into 6 role groups and 12 hierarchical levels, enabling easier comparisons of structures across and within firms. Our findings not only align with prior research but also offer insights into industry‐specific structural changes, functional distributions within organizations, and the evolution of executive roles. This work also highlights the potential of generative AI as a tool to empirically investigate key strategy questions. Managerial Summary One of the most important decisions senior managers make pertains to defining their firms' organizational structures. However, obtaining data on firms' structures can be challenging due to difficulties in accessing data and comparing structures across firms. In this paper, we develop a novel dataset of top management team compositions of S&P 500 firms between 1993 and 2020. Alongside providing the original names and job titles, we use generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) to categorize executives' titles into 6 role groups and 12 hierarchical levels, allowing easier comparisons of structures across and within firms. We hope that this new dataset will spur greater scholarly interest in organizational structure, offering insights into how firms are structured and the implications of these structures.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要研究总结 使用档案组织结构数据的研究并不像人们预期的那样普遍，尽管这是一个关键的战略话题。我们希望通过引入一个新的、手工收集的1993年至2020年间标准普尔500强公司高层管理团队组成的数据集，促进这一领域的更多研究。除了提供原始的职务头衔外，我们使用生成性人工智能（AI）将高管头衔归类为6个角色组和12个层级，便于比较不同公司及公司内部的结构。我们的发现不仅与先前的研究一致，还提供了行业特定结构变化、组织内职能分布以及高管角色演变的洞见。这项工作还突出了生成性AI作为实证调查关键战略问题的潜力。管理总结 高级经理做出的最重要的决策之一是定义公司的组织结构。然而，由于获取公司结构数据存在困难，比较不同公司的结构可能具有挑战性。在本文中，我们开发了一个1993年至2020年间标准普尔500强公司高层管理团队组成的新数据集。除了提供原始的姓名和职务头衔外，我们使用生成性人工智能（AI）将高管头衔归类为6个角色组和12个层级，允许更容易地比较不同公司及公司内部的结构。我们希望这个新数据集将激发对组织结构的更大学术兴趣，提供公司结构及其结构影响的洞见。

papers.title_en: Performance feedback and change in R&D alliance portfolio breadth: The moderating role of economic conditions
papers.title_zh: 绩效反馈与研发联盟组合宽度的变化：经济条件的调节作用
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Research Summary We investigate how firm performance feedback and economic conditions (upturns and downturns) impact changes in the breadth of partner types within a firm's R&D alliance portfolio (R&D AP breadth). We theorize that economic conditions moderate firms' motivation to change R&D AP breadth in response to social and historical performance‐aspiration discrepancies, and shape whether they respond more strongly to social or historical aspirations. Using cross‐industry data on Swiss firms (1999–2020), we find that firms performing below social aspiration are more likely to expand R&D AP breadth during downturns but less likely to do so during upturns. Performance below historical aspiration shows no significant effect once economic conditions are considered. Managerial Summary We examine how firms adjust their range of business partners in response to past performance and economic conditions. Analyzing Swiss firms from 1999 to 2020, we find that firms strategically adjust the number of partnership types in response to economic climates. During tough economic times, firms tend to broaden their R&D partnership types when they fall short of peer performance benchmarks. They tend not to do so in prosperous periods under similar performance conditions. We found no consistent effects when performance is benchmarked against the firm's history. These insights help managers strategically navigate alliances under fluctuating economic conditions and underscore the importance of peer‐relative performance benchmarks.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要研究总结 我们研究了公司绩效反馈和经济状况（上升期和衰退期）如何影响公司研发联盟组合中合作伙伴类型的广度（研发AP广度）的变化。我们假设经济状况调节公司改变研发AP广度的动机，以响应社会和历史绩效-抱负差异，并塑造它们是否对社会或历史抱负做出更强烈的反应。利用瑞士公司（1999-2020年）的跨行业数据，我们发现绩效低于社会抱负的公司在经济衰退期更有可能扩大研发AP广度，但在经济上升期不太可能这样做。一旦考虑经济状况，低于历史抱负的绩效没有显著影响。管理总结 我们检查公司如何根据过去的绩效和经济状况调整其业务范围。分析1999年至2020年的瑞士公司，我们发现公司根据经济气候战略性地调整合作伙伴类型的数量。在经济困难时期，公司倾向于在未能达到同行绩效基准时扩大其研发合作伙伴类型。在类似的绩效条件下，它们在繁荣时期通常不会这样做。当绩效与公司历史进行基准比较时，我们没有发现一致的影响。这些见解帮助管理者在经济状况波动下战略性地导航联盟，并强调了相对同行绩效基准的重要性。

papers.title_en: Launch support: Managing complementor bottlenecks in the disruptive innovation of small satellites
papers.title_zh: 启动支持：管理小型卫星颠覆性创新中的互补者瓶颈
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Research Summary Through both qualitative and quantitative analyses of large‐rocket providers' support for small‐satellite manufacturers before the emergence of small rockets, we examine how disruptors to an incumbent ecosystem gain support from complementors of the incumbent technology. Our analyses illuminate the incumbent complementors' adjustment costs arising from cospecialization with specific incumbent technology designs and resource dependency on major incumbent technology customers. These adjustment costs disincentivize incumbent complementors from supporting the disruptors. In addition, we demonstrate that strategies adopted by the disruptors, such as technological standardization and forward integration, help mitigate these adjustment costs and incentivize incumbent complementors to support the disruptive innovation. Managerial Summary Small satellites represent a disruptive innovation that significantly reduces the time and cost of satellite production and launch. Despite the large number of small satellites launched today, initially, they were viewed as “second‐class launch citizens,” with incumbent large‐rocket companies resisting launching them. This paper examines how small‐satellite manufacturers overcame this resistance before their dedicated small‐satellite ecosystem was established. We identify the adjustment costs that caused resistance from large‐rocket companies and examine two specific strategies implemented by disruptors—technological standardization and forward integration—to mitigate these costs and gain support from large‐rocket companies.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要研究总结：通过对小火箭出现之前大型火箭供应商对小型卫星制造商的支持进行定性和定量分析，我们研究了在位生态系统的颠覆者如何从在位技术的补充者那里获得支持。我们的分析揭示了在位补充者因与特定在位技术设计共同专业化和对主要在位技术客户的资源依赖而产生的调整成本。这些调整成本阻碍了在位补充者支持颠覆者。此外，我们展示了颠覆者采取的策略，如技术标准化和前向整合，有助于减轻这些调整成本，并激励在位补充者支持颠覆性创新。管理总结：小型卫星代表了一种颠覆性创新，显著降低了卫星生产和发射的时间和成本。尽管今天发射了大量小型卫星，但最初它们被视为“二等发射公民”，在位的大型火箭公司抵制发射它们。本文研究了小型卫星制造商在建立专用小型卫星生态系统之前如何克服这种抵制。我们识别了导致大型火箭公司抵制的调整成本，并检验了颠覆者实施的两种具体策略——技术标准化和前向整合——以减轻这些成本并获得大型火箭公司的支持。

papers.title_en: Founders' pre‐entry knowledge and the heterogeneous returns to accelerator participation
papers.title_zh: 创始人的先前知识与加速器参与的异质性回报
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Research Summary While startup accelerators often benefit founders and their ventures, these gains may not be uniform. We examine how founders' pre‐entry knowledge—the cumulative education, industry experience, and entrepreneurial exposure that teams acquire prior to launching their startups—shapes the heterogeneous returns to accelerator participation. We propose two potential mechanisms driving these returns: knowledge compensation , whereby accelerators fill gaps in basic knowledge and competencies, and knowledge complementarity , whereby accelerators amplify the absorption and deployment of expert knowledge. Using data from 6723 startups and their founding teams, we find evidence in support of the complementarity mechanism. Our findings also suggest that the returns to accelerator participation are contingent on the alignment between founders' pre‐entry knowledge and program design. Managerial Summary While startup accelerators aim to level the entrepreneurial playing field, we find that founders with substantial pre‐entry knowledge and experience tend to gain more from participation in these programs than novice entrepreneurs, potentially widening startup performance gaps. Program design also appears to play a key role. While specialized and unstructured programs offer value for seasoned entrepreneurs by building complementary knowledge, structured and generalist programs offer some, albeit limited, opportunities for less‐experienced teams to build foundational skills. These findings underscore the need for tailored programming that aligns with participants' learning needs. For program designers and policymakers, these findings suggest investing in diverse formats to support varied founder profiles. For entrepreneurs, they highlight the importance of selecting programs that complement and build upon their team's prior knowledge.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要研究总结 尽管创业加速器通常对创始人及其企业有益，但这些收益可能并不均匀。我们研究了创始人的先前知识——团队在启动创业之前获得的累积教育、行业经验和创业曝光——如何塑造对加速器参与的异质性回报。我们提出了两个潜在的机制来推动这些回报：知识补偿，即加速器填补基本知识和能力的差距；知识互补性，即加速器增强专业知识的吸收和部署。利用来自6723家初创公司及其创始团队的数据，我们发现证据支持互补性机制。我们的研究还表明，加速器参与的回报取决于创始人的先前知识与项目设计的一致性。管理总结 尽管创业加速器旨在平衡创业竞争环境，我们发现具有大量先前知识和经验的创始人往往比新手创业者从这些项目的参与中获得更多收益，可能会扩大初创公司绩效差距。项目设计似乎也发挥着关键作用。虽然专业化和非结构化项目通过构建互补知识为经验丰富的企业家提供价值，但结构化和通用项目为经验较少的团队提供了一些（尽管有限）的机会来构建基础技能。这些发现强调了需要与参与者的学习需求一致的定制化编程。对于项目设计者和政策制定者来说，这些发现表明投资于多样化的格式以支持不同的创始人档案。对于企业家来说，它们强调了选择补充和建立在团队先前知识基础上的项目的重要性。

papers.title_en: The use of <scp>LLMs</scp> to annotate data in management research: Foundational guidelines and warnings
papers.title_zh: 标题：在管理研究中使用大型语言模型标注数据：基础指南与警示
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Research Summary The emergence of large language models (LLMs) offers new opportunities for AI integration in research, particularly for data annotation and text classification. However, researchers lack guidance on implementation best practices, as the benefits and risks of these tools remain poorly understood. We develop a foundational framework for effective LLM implementation in management research, providing structured guidance on key decisions throughout the research process. We illustrate this framework through an empirical application: classifying sustainability claims in crowdfunding projects. While LLMs can match or exceed traditional methods' performance at lower cost, we find that variations in prompt design can significantly affect results and downstream analyses. We develop procedures for sensitivity analysis and provide detailed documentation to help researchers implement robustness while maintaining methodological integrity. Managerial Summary Large language models (LLMs) offer powerful new tools for business research, especially for analyzing and categorizing text data. However, managers and researchers lack clear guidance on how to use these tools effectively and reliably. This study creates a practical framework for implementing LLMs in management research, covering key decisions from model selection to result validation. Using a real‐world example of analyzing sustainability claims in crowdfunding campaigns, we demonstrate that LLMs can match traditional methods while being faster and cheaper. However, small changes in how you instruct the AI can significantly alter results and business conclusions. We provide systematic procedures for testing result reliability and offer practical tools to help managers implement AI‐powered analysis while maintaining rigorous standards and avoiding misleading findings.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要研究总结：大型语言模型（LLMs）的出现为人工智能在研究中的整合提供了新的机会，特别是在数据标注和文本分类方面。然而，研究人员缺乏关于实施最佳实践的指导，因为这些工具的好处和风险仍然不为人所充分理解。我们为管理研究中有效的LLM实施开发了一个基础框架，提供了研究过程中关键决策的结构化指导。我们通过一个实证应用来说明这个框架：对众筹项目中的可持续性声明进行分类。虽然LLMs可以在较低成本下匹配或超越传统方法的性能，但我们发现提示设计的变化可以显著影响结果和下游分析。我们开发了敏感性分析的程序，并提供了详细文档，以帮助研究人员在保持方法论完整性的同时实现稳健性。管理总结：大型语言模型（LLMs）为商业研究提供了强大的新工具，特别是用于分析和分类文本数据。然而，管理者和研究人员缺乏如何有效可靠地使用这些工具的明确指导。本研究创建了一个实用的框架，用于在管理研究中实施LLMs，涵盖了从模型选择到结果验证的关键决策。利用分析众筹活动中的可持续性声明这一现实世界的例子，我们展示了LLMs可以匹配传统方法，同时更快、更便宜。然而，对AI的指令方式的微小变化可以显著改变结果和商业结论。我们提供了测试结果可靠性的系统程序，并提供了实用工具，以帮助管理者在保持严格标准和避免误导性发现的同时，实施人工智能驱动的分析。

papers.title_en: <scp>TRIPS</scp> and knowledge diffusion from low‐ and middle‐income countries
papers.title_zh: 《与贸易有关的知识产权协定》与中低收入国家的知识传播
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Research Summary We examine a significant yet underappreciated effect of IPR implementation: the dissemination after TRIPS implementation of established scientific knowledge from low‐ and middle‐income countries (LMICs) into the global scientific system of pharmaceutical development. The staggered implementation of the policy allows identification of increased diffusion of pre‐existing LMIC knowledge on global diseases into the global corporate invention pipeline. For neglected diseases, the uptake remains in academic science. Other results demonstrate institutional effects in the scientific communities in LMICs through increases in scientific productivity, cross‐border collaborations, and scientist mobility. These and other results recast TRIPS’ impact as sensitive to the incentives of global corporations and institutionally significant for LMICs. We discuss implications for research on innovation strategy. Managerial Summary The implementation in an LMIC of an intellectual‐property system (e.g., of patents) carries implications for dissemination of pre‐existing scientific knowledge from the implementing country into the global scientific system. Corporate invention more intensively incorporates pre‐existing LMIC knowledge when the subject is global diseases such as cardiovascular conditions and cancer. However, when the subject is neglected diseases such as infectious conditions, the significant uptake remains in academic science. Overall, this research suggests that the implementation of patent and other intellectual‐property protections influences the integration of LMIC science into the global system differentially based on the relevance for global commercialization.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要研究总结 我们检验了知识产权实施的一个重大但被低估的影响：在《与贸易有关的知识产权协定》（TRIPS）实施后，来自低收入和中等收入国家（LMICs）的既定科学知识在全球药品开发科学体系中的传播。政策的分阶段实施使我们能够识别出全球企业发明管道中对全球疾病相关的LMICs既有知识的增加扩散。对于被忽视的疾病，吸收仍然在学术科学中。其他结果表明，通过增加科学生产力、跨境合作和科学家流动性，LMICs的科学界出现了制度效应。这些以及其他结果将TRIPS的影响重新塑造为对全球公司的激励敏感，对LMICs具有制度重要性。我们讨论了对创新战略研究的影响。管理总结 在LMICs实施知识产权体系（例如，专利）对从实施国家传播既有科学知识进入全球科学体系具有影响。当主题是全球疾病，如心血管疾病和癌症时，企业发明更密集地整合了LMICs既有的知识。然而，当主题是被忽视的疾病，如传染病时，重大的吸收仍然在学术科学中。总体而言，这项研究表明，专利和其他知识产权保护的实施根据对全球商业化的关联性，不同程度地影响LMICs科学融入全球体系。

papers.title_en: Beyond the front page: In‐text citations to patents as traces of inventor knowledge
papers.title_zh: 超越首页：作为发明者知识痕迹的文中专利引用
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Research Summary This study introduces in‐text patent‐to‐patent citations—references embedded in the body of patent documents—as a novel data source to trace knowledge flows. Unlike front‐page citations, which often reflect legal requirements, in‐text citations are more likely to originate from inventors and signal meaningful technological linkages. We show that they exhibit stronger geographic and semantic proximity, greater self‐referentiality, and closer alignment with inventor knowledge. Though less frequent than front‐page citations, they yield robust results in models of knowledge diffusion. We release a validated dataset and reproducible code to support future research. Our findings offer new opportunities for scholars interested in the microfoundations of innovation, the geography of knowledge flows, and the role of inventors in shaping firms' knowledge trajectories. Managerial Summary This study introduces in‐text patent citations—references embedded in the technical description of patent documents—as a new way to trace how knowledge flows among inventors and firms. Unlike traditional front‐page citations, which often reflect legal formalities or examiner input, in‐text citations originate more directly from inventors and thus capture genuine technological linkages. Using large‐scale U.S. patent data, we show that in‐text citations connect geographically and thematically closer inventions and are more likely to involve the same firms or inventors. The dataset, released as open data, enables more accurate analyses of innovation dynamics and firm knowledge strategies. Managers can use these insights to better understand how ideas diffuse and where valuable inventive knowledge resides.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要研究总结 本研究引入了专利文件正文中的专利引用——嵌入在专利文件正文中的引用——作为一种新的数据来源，用以追踪知识流动。与通常反映法律要求的首页引用不同，正文引用更有可能源自发明者，表明有意义的技术联系。我们展示出它们表现出更强的地理和语义接近性、更大的自引用性，以及与发明者知识的更紧密对齐。尽管正文引用不如首页引用频繁，但它们在知识扩散模型中产生了稳健的结果。我们发布了一个经过验证的数据集和可复现的代码，以支持未来的研究。我们的发现为对创新的微观基础、知识流动的地理学以及发明者在塑造企业知识轨迹中的作用感兴趣的学者提供了新的机会。管理总结 本研究引入了专利文件技术描述中的专利引用——嵌入在专利文件技术描述中的引用——作为追踪发明者和企业间知识流动的新方式。与传统的首页引用不同，后者通常反映法律形式或审查员输入，正文引用更直接地源自发明者，因此捕捉到真正的技术联系。利用大规模的美国专利数据，我们展示出正文引用连接了地理和主题上更接近的发明，并且更有可能涉及相同的企业或发明者。作为开放数据发布的数据集，使得对创新动态和企业知识策略的分析更加准确。管理者可以利用这些洞见，更好地理解思想如何传播以及宝贵的发明知识位于何处。

papers.title_en: Firm Commitments
papers.title_zh: 企业承诺
papers.abstract_en: A growing fraction of companies globally have made commitments to reduce their carbon emissions by a certain date. Whereas the companies that make commitments subsequently reduce their emissions, the effect on overall emissions of companies (including those that do not commit) has been small. The companies that commit and those that make the most ambitious commitments tend to have lower emissions; firm commitments are less prevalent in countries where governments have made national commitments. Overall, the commitment movements have been successful in drawing the willing but have found greater resistance from the companies that most need to reduce their emissions. This paper was accepted by Caroline Flammer, sustainability. Funding: This work was supported by Horizon Europe Climate, Energy and Mobility [Grant ERC-AG 885552] from the European Research Council (ERC) under the ERC Advanced Grant program “Investors and Climate Change.” Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07298 .
papers.abstract_zh: 全球越来越多的公司承诺在特定日期前减少碳排放。尽管做出承诺的公司随后确实减少了排放，但对公司总体排放量（包括那些没有承诺的公司）的影响很小。做出承诺的公司以及那些做出最雄心勃勃承诺的公司往往排放量较低；在政府已做出国家承诺的国家，公司承诺的普及率较低。总体而言，承诺运动成功地吸引了愿意参与的公司，但在那些最需要减少排放的公司中遇到了更大的阻力。本文由卡罗琳·弗拉默（Caroline Flammer）接受，主题为可持续性。资金来源：这项工作得到了欧洲研究委员会（ERC）在“投资者与气候变化”高级资助计划下，由欧洲地平线气候变化、能源和流动性项目[Grant ERC-AG 885552]的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07298 查阅。

papers.title_en: Does Privacy Regulation Harm Content Providers? A Longitudinal Analysis of the Impact of the GDPR
papers.title_zh: 隐私法规会损害内容提供商吗？GDPR影响的纵向分析
papers.abstract_en: Concerns that the European General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) would adversely affect the ability of news and media websites to create new quality content have not been thoroughly investigated in the literature. We construct a longitudinal data set of European Union (EU) and U.S. news and media websites to study how online content providers responded to the GDPR over time and whether potential restrictions on online tracking enforced by the regulation affected their downstream outcomes. We find robust evidence that both EU and U.S. news and media websites responded to the regulation by altering their data collection practices, but did so differently, with EU websites reducing tracking and implementing consent mechanisms at higher rates than their U.S. counterparts. Although we detect a reduction in average page views per user on EU relative to U.S. websites, we do not find evidence of negative impacts, in both the short and long term, on EU websites’ provision of new content or on several proxies for quality of that content, such as social media engagement metrics, various traffic measures, and articles’ text analytics. We also find no evidence of differences in survival rates across EU and U.S. news and media websites, and no evidence that monetization strategies changed at higher rates on EU relative to U.S. websites. The analysis suggests that EU online content providers did implement changes to their data collection practices in response to the GDPR but were able to use data minimization and consent mechanism strategies that allowed them to keep producing content and engage audiences at degrees on par with their U.S. counterparts. This paper was accepted by D. J. Wu, information systems. Funding: The authors gratefully acknowledge support from the Alfred P. Sloan Foundation, CARNOT Télécom & Société numérique, DATAIA Convergence Institute (as part of the Programme d’Investissement d’Avenir [Grant ANR-17-CONV-0003] operated by Institut Mines Telecom, Business School Project YPOOG), the French National Research Agency [Grant ANR-21-CE23-0031-02], and the National Science Foundation [Awards 2237327, 2237328, and 2237329]. Supplemental Material: The online appendices and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.03186 .
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要： 文献中尚未充分研究欧洲通用数据保护条例（GDPR）可能对新闻和媒体网站创造新优质内容能力产生的不利影响。我们构建了一个包含欧盟（EU）和美国新闻及媒体网站的纵向数据集，以研究在线内容提供商如何随时间响应GDPR，以及该条例强制执行的在线跟踪潜在限制是否影响了它们的下游结果。我们发现有力的证据表明，欧盟和美国新闻及媒体网站都通过改变数据收集实践来响应该条例，但方式不同，欧盟网站比美国网站更大幅度地减少了跟踪并实施了同意机制。尽管我们检测到欧盟网站相对于美国网站每用户平均页面浏览量有所减少，但我们没有发现对欧盟网站提供新内容或多个内容质量代理指标（如社交媒体参与度指标、各种流量度量和文章文本分析）在短期和长期内产生负面影响的证据。我们还发现欧盟和美国新闻及媒体网站的生存率没有差异，也没有证据表明欧盟相对于美国网站的货币化策略变化率更高。分析表明，欧盟在线内容提供商确实响应GDPR实施了数据收集实践的变更，但能够使用数据最小化和同意机制策略，使它们能够保持与美国同行相当的生产内容和吸引观众的程度。本文由D. J. Wu，信息系统接受。资金：作者感谢阿尔弗雷德P.斯隆基金会、CARNOT Télécom & Société numérique、DATAIA Convergence Institute（作为Programme d’Investissement d’Avenir [Grant ANR-17-CONV-0003]的一部分，由Institut Mines Telecom运营，Business School Project YPOOG）、法国国家研究署[Grant ANR-21-CE23-0031-02]和国家科学基金会[Awards 2237327、2237328和2237329]的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.03186找到。

papers.title_en: Dynamic Control of a Make-to-Order System Under Model Uncertainty
papers.title_zh: 面向订单生产系统在模型不确定性下的动态控制
papers.abstract_en: Deriving control policies for a make-to-order manufacturing system is often predicated on a well-specified probabilistic model that governs demand realization. In practice, however, such a model may be a simplification of the actual scenario because of tractability considerations. Consequently, policies obtained under such simplifications may perform poorly if the assumed model does not accurately capture reality. In this paper, we propose a modeling paradigm that can generate control policies based on a simplified model, accounting for possible model errors that may result. The make-to-order system offers multiple products and has an outsourcing mechanism. Our focus is on addressing deliberate model simplification for the demand realization process. We formulate a robust control problem that takes the form of a two-player, zero-sum game. Because the original formulation is not tractable enough, we further develop an approximating problem under the heavy-traffic assumption that effectively results in a stochastic differential game. The solution to this game then translates into an implementable control policy for the original make-to-order system. We supplement the proposed modeling paradigm with a simulation-based method for selecting an appropriate uncertainty set. Numerical experiments expose, among other things, the value of building robustness into decision making. This paper was accepted by Barış Ata, stochastic models and simulation. Funding: X. Zhu’s work is supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China (NSFC) [Grants 72401124 and 72394363/72394360]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01820 .
papers.abstract_zh: 为按订单制造系统制定控制策略通常基于一个明确的概率模型，该模型控制需求实现。然而，在实践中，由于可处理性考虑，这样的模型可能是实际场景的简化。因此，如果假设的模型不能准确捕捉现实，那么在这种简化下获得的策略可能表现不佳。在本文中，我们提出了一种建模范式，可以根据简化模型生成控制策略，同时考虑可能导致的模型误差。按订单系统提供多种产品，并具有外包机制。我们的重点是解决需求实现过程中的故意模型简化。我们构建了一个鲁棒控制问题，其形式为两人零和博弈。由于原始表述不够可处理，我们进一步在重流量假设下开发了一个近似问题，有效地导致了一个随机微分博弈。这个博弈的解决方案随后转化为原始按订单系统的可实施控制策略。我们用基于模拟的方法补充了所提出的建模范式，以选择适当的不确定性集。数值实验揭示了在决策中构建鲁棒性的价值等。本文由Barış Ata接受，随机模型和模拟。资金：朱X的工作由中国国家自然科学基金（NSFC）[Grants 72401124和72394363/72394360]支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01820找到。

papers.title_en: Effects of the 2021 Expanded Child Tax Credit
papers.title_zh: 2021年扩大儿童税收抵免的影响
papers.abstract_en: We analyze the impact of the 2021 Child Tax Credit (CTC) expansion using detailed transaction data from nearly two million individuals and difference-in-difference analyses around monthly CTC payments. We find that recipients significantly increase their consumption in the week following the payment versus the prior week, with more pronounced effects for lower-income recipients and those with more children. We also find a significant reduction in liquidity constraints for lower-income recipients, with reductions in overdrafts, use of high-interest payday loans, and use of gig work for supplemental income. Building on these initial findings, our analysis further delves into more nuanced, policy-targeted aspects: We observe a greater alleviation of liquidity constraints from monthly CTC payments compared with annual tax refunds. In addition, monthly payments decrease consumption volatility and increase stability in consumption levels. These results inform considerations for payment frequency. Furthermore, we provide insights into the income thresholds for the policy’s phase-in and phase-out ranges by identifying the most pronounced consumption effects among the lowest-income recipients—who benefit from full refundability under the plan—and noting an absence of significant consumption changes among higher-income recipients. Our results present the first large-scale, transaction-based, empirical archival evidence of the effects stemming from the 2021 CTC amendments and provide insights for policy-related discussions. This paper was accepted by Eric So, accounting. Funding: We acknowledge funding from the Think Forward Initiative and the University of California, Irvine, and the U See I Write initiative at the University of California, Irvine, for focused writing retreats which facilitated the writing of this manuscript. Supplemental Material: The data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02254 .
papers.abstract_zh: 我们利用近两百万人的详细交易数据和围绕每月儿童税收抵免（CTC）支付的差异-差异分析，分析了2021年儿童税收抵免（CTC）扩展的影响。我们发现，与前一周相比，接受者在支付后的一周内显著增加了消费，对于低收入接受者和有更多孩子的家庭，这种效应更为明显。我们还发现，低收入接受者的流动性约束显著减少，表现为透支减少、高利贷日贷款使用减少以及为补充收入而从事零工工作的减少。在这些初步发现的基础上，我们的分析进一步深入探讨了更微妙、针对性更强的政策方面：我们观察到，与年度退税相比，每月CTC支付对缓解流动性约束的作用更大。此外，每月支付减少了消费波动，增加了消费水平的稳定性。这些结果为支付频率的考虑提供了信息。此外，我们通过识别在计划下完全可退还的最低收入接受者中消费效应最明显，并注意到高收入接受者中没有显著的消费变化，为政策的逐步引入和逐步淘汰范围提供了收入阈值的见解。我们的结果提供了2021年CTC修正案影响的第一项大规模、基于交易的实证档案证据，并为政策相关讨论提供了见解。本文由Eric So接受，会计。资金：我们感谢Think Forward Initiative和加州大学欧文分校以及加州大学欧文分校的U See I Write initiative为集中写作静修提供资金，这有助于撰写本文。补充材料：数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02254找到。

papers.title_en: A Method for Asynchronous Time Series Analysis with Marketing Applications
papers.title_zh: 一种具有营销应用的异步时间序列分析方法
papers.abstract_en: Many time series data evolve asynchronously. In marketing, for example, we observe ad liking every second, hourly clickstreams, daily sales, weekly brand awareness, or monthly ad expenditures. Thus, the question arises: how to estimate dynamic models when metrics evolve at different frequencies? To this end, we develop a new method for estimation and inference of state space models for asynchronous data. In contrast to existing approaches, the proposed method does not require any data preprocessing to align frequencies. We derive the optimal gain factor from first principles and demonstrate in three simulation studies that the new method recovers model parameters as accurately as the full-information Kalman filter as if all data were available. This finding holds across various degrees of noise levels and data sparsity. More importantly, we show that ignoring data asynchronicity results in substantially biased parameter estimates. Empirically, we illustrate the efficacy of the new method via two applications: copy testing of an advertisement and a marketing mix model, both with asynchronous data. It yields meaningful results compared with those obtained by aligning asynchronous data to the slowest frequency (i.e., data aggregation). In the marketing mix application, for example, data aggregation produces erroneously insignificant estimates of sales carryover and TV effectiveness, and these become significant when we apply the new method. These biased estimates can have serious managerial consequences. Thus, the proposed method paves the way to analyze asynchronous time series data: slow- or fast-moving dependent variables, slow- or fast-moving independent variables, and all of them at equal or unequal frequencies. This paper was accepted by Eric Anderson, marketing. Funding: This work was supported by the Marketing Science Institute [Grant 4-1959]. P. A. Naik acknowledges the financial support received from the University of California Davis travel and small research grants program across 2015–2024. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.04336 .
papers.abstract_zh: 许多时间序列数据以异步方式演变。例如，在市场营销中，我们观察到每秒的广告点赞、每小时的点击流、每日销售、每周品牌意识或每月广告支出。因此，问题出现了：当指标以不同频率演变时，如何估计动态模型？为此，我们开发了一种新的方法，用于估计和推断异步数据的状态空间模型。与现有方法不同，所提出的方法不需要任何数据预处理来对齐频率。我们从基本原理出发推导出最优增益因子，并在三项模拟研究中证明，新方法恢复模型参数的准确性与全信息卡尔曼滤波器一样，就好像所有数据都可用一样。这一发现适用于各种噪声水平和数据稀疏度。更重要的是，我们展示了忽略数据异步性会导致参数估计的显著偏差。从实证上，我们通过两个应用来说明新方法的有效性：广告副本测试和市场营销组合模型，两者都包含异步数据。与将异步数据对齐到最慢频率（即数据聚合）所获得的结果相比，它产生了有意义的结果。例如，在市场营销组合应用中，数据聚合产生了销售延续和电视效果的错误不显著估计，而当我们应用新方法时，这些变得显著。这些有偏估计可能会产生严重的管理后果。因此，所提出的方法为分析异步时间序列数据铺平了道路：慢速或快速移动的因变量、慢速或快速移动的自变量，以及它们以相等或不相等的频率出现。本文由埃里克·安德森接受，市场营销。资金：这项工作得到了市场营销科学研究所[Grant 4-1959]的支持。P.A. Naik感谢加州大学戴维斯分校在2015-2024年期间提供的旅行和小额研究资助计划的财政支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.04336找到。

papers.title_en: Not Good Enough, but Try Again! The Impact of Improved Rejection Communications on Contributor Retention and Performance in Open Knowledge Collaboration
papers.title_zh: 不够好，但再试一次！改进拒绝沟通对开放知识协作中贡献者留存和表现的影响
papers.abstract_en: Producing high-quality content through open knowledge collaboration presents a dilemma. Successful quality control requires rejecting contributions that do not align with the aims of an open knowledge collaboration system, yet rejections demotivate new contributors from attempting further contributions. Building on research on the regulation of behavior in online communities and on organizational selection, we theorize how the way rejections are communicated affect new contributors. We leverage a change to the rejection notices used by the Stack Overflow community question-answering service to study the issue empirically. First, we use a regression discontinuity in time design to construct a natural experiment to estimate the average treatment effect of more informative rejection notices on the retention of initially rejected contributors. The results show that notices that better explain the reason for rejecting a contributor’s initial question—and therefore reduce uncertainty about the outcome if the contributor tries again—increase retention by approximately 21.7 percentage points. Second, we use a mediation model to study mechanisms by which more informative rejection notices affect contributor performance. We find that more informative notices affect contributor performance through selection rather than performance improvement. Additional contributors, who are retained because of the more informative rejection notices, ask more questions, on average, whereas we find no evidence of individual contributors improving their performance in terms of the quality or quantity of their contributions. Overall, the results suggest that rejection communications offer low-cost interventions to mitigate the trade-off between new contributor retention and the quality of contributions in open knowledge collaboration. This paper was accepted by Hemant Bhargava, information systems. Funding: Financial support from the Fox School of Business, Temple University (Young Scholar Interdisciplinary Forum) is gratefully acknowledged. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2021.02720 .
papers.abstract_zh: 通过开放知识协作生产高质量内容面临着一个困境。成功的质量控制需要拒绝与开放知识协作系统目标不一致的贡献，但拒绝会降低新贡献者进一步贡献的积极性。基于在线社区行为规范和组织选择的研究，我们理论化了拒绝沟通方式如何影响新贡献者。我们利用Stack Overflow社区问答服务中使用的拒绝通知的变化，实证研究这个问题。首先，我们使用时间上的回归不连续设计构建了一个自然实验，以估计更具信息量的拒绝通知对最初被拒绝贡献者留存的平均处理效应。结果显示，更好地解释拒绝贡献者初始问题原因的通知——因此减少了贡献者再次尝试时对结果的不确定性——将留存率提高了约21.7个百分点。其次，我们使用中介模型研究更具信息量的拒绝通知如何影响贡献者表现的机制。我们发现，更具信息量的通知通过选择而非表现提升影响贡献者表现。由于更具信息量的拒绝通知而保留的额外贡献者平均提出更多的问题，而我们没有发现个别贡献者在贡献质量或数量方面的表现有所提升的证据。总体而言，结果表明，拒绝沟通提供了低成本的干预措施，以缓解开放知识协作中新贡献者留存与贡献质量之间的权衡。本文由Hemant Bhargava，信息系统接受。资金：感谢天普大学福克斯商学院（青年学者跨学科论坛）提供的财政支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2021.02720找到。

papers.title_en: Market Design Choices, Racial Discrimination, and Equitable Microentrepreneurship in Digital Marketplaces
papers.title_zh: 市场设计选择、种族歧视与数字市场中的公平微型创业
papers.abstract_en: This study investigates the potential of market design choices, specifically quality certification, to mitigate racial discrimination in digital marketplaces. Using a regression discontinuity design (RDD) that exploits the discontinuity in Airbnb’s Superhost assignment, we find that Black hosts benefit 1.5 times more from the quality certification than other hosts. Moreover, we find compelling evidence that this disproportionate increase does not come at the expense of non-Superhost Black hosts. This suggests that quality certification can effectively reduce discrimination and promote equitable outcomes. Further, our analysis utilizing a doubly robust machine learning approach reveals that the effectiveness of quality certification persists even in the prominent presence of consumer reviews, a widely used market feature and a credible user-generated quality signal. Our research underscores the judicious use of market design in fostering equity for minority entrepreneurs in digital marketplaces. This paper was accepted by Hemant Bhargava, information systems. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01717 .
papers.abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了市场设计选择，特别是质量认证，对减轻数字市场中种族歧视的潜力。利用回归不连续设计（RDD），我们利用Airbnb超级房东分配中的不连续性，发现黑人房东从质量认证中获益比其他房东多1.5倍。此外，我们发现有力证据表明，这种不成比例的增加并没有以牺牲非超级房东黑人房东为代价。这表明质量认证可以有效减少歧视，促进公平结果。进一步地，我们利用双重稳健的机器学习方法进行的分析揭示，即使在消费者评论这一广泛使用且可信的用户生成质量信号的显著存在下，质量认证的有效性仍然持续存在。我们的研究强调了在数字市场中促进少数族裔企业家公平的审慎市场设计使用。本文由Hemant Bhargava，信息系统接受。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01717 查阅。

papers.title_en: Uncertainty Risk Resolution Before Earnings Announcements
papers.title_zh: 标题：盈利公告前的不确定性风险化解
papers.abstract_en: Data show that 72% of the earnings announcement premium is realized before, rather than after, earnings releases. We propose that uncertainty risk resolution before the announcement leads to large pre-announcement returns and test the uncertainty risk resolution hypothesis in the cross section. Compelling empirical evidence supports this hypothesis: an interquartile increase in the firm’s uncertainty level is associated with a 6.3% greater uncertainty reduction and 0.65% higher market-adjusted returns in the 10-day period before earnings announcements. We also provide evidence that there are two distinct channels for uncertainty risk resolution: information acquisition by investors and information supply by analysts and firm management. This paper was accepted by Lukas Schmid, finance. Funding: X. Zhang acknowledges financial support from the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72350710220]. Supplemental Material: The internet appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.03240 .
papers.abstract_zh: 数据显示，72%的盈利公告溢价是在盈利公告之前而非之后实现的。我们提出，在公告前解决不确定性风险会导致公告前的大额回报，并在横截面上检验了不确定性风险解决假设。有力的实证证据支持这一假设：公司不确定性水平的四分位增加与盈利公告前10天内不确定性减少6.3%和市场调整后回报提高0.65%相关。我们还提供了证据，表明存在两个不同的不确定性风险解决渠道：投资者的信息获取和分析师及公司管理层的信息供应。本文由Lukas Schmid负责金融领域的审稿。资金来源：张X承认得到国家自然科学基金的财务支持[Grant 72350710220]。补充材料：互联网附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.03240 查阅。

papers.title_en: When Rivalry Backfires: How Individual Skill and Risk of Status Loss Moderate the Effects of Rivalry on Performance
papers.title_zh: 竞争适得其反：个人技能和地位丧失风险如何调节竞争对绩效的影响
papers.abstract_en: Existing rivalry research finds that people try harder and perform better when competing against their rivals. However, are there conditions under which rivalry can harm performance? We integrate rivalry theory with regulatory fit theory to propose two moderators of rivalry: individual skill and situational risk for status change. We test our predictions using data from software programming contests involving more than 4.6 million competitive encounters across 16,846 software developers (“coders”) to examine the causal effects of rivalry and the conditions under which it may backfire. We find that, on average, coders who are randomly assigned to compete against a field of competitors with whom they share a rivalrous history exhibit higher performance, above and beyond other established drivers of performance in competition. Importantly, however, this positive effect of rivalry is moderated by (1) coders’ skill level, such that rivalry is more beneficial for more skilled coders and is harmful for less skilled coders, and (2) coders’ risk of experiencing a status change, such that coders who face a possible status loss exhibit decreased performance when competing against rivals. Thus, we extend research on rivalry by revealing the conditions under which it can harm performance, which is vital to understanding its role in organizations. This paper was accepted by Sameer Srivastava, organizations. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00344 .
papers.abstract_zh: 现有竞争研究发现，人们在与对手竞争时会加倍努力并表现得更好。然而，在什么条件下竞争可能会损害表现呢？我们将竞争理论与调节适应理论相结合，提出两个竞争的调节变量：个人技能和地位变化的风险情境。我们使用涉及超过468万次竞争性遭遇的16,846名软件开发人员（“编码员”）的软件编程竞赛数据来测试我们的预测，以检验竞争的因果效应以及它可能适得其反的条件。我们发现，平均而言，随机分配与他们有竞争历史的竞争对手竞争的编码员表现出更高的表现，超出了其他已建立的竞争表现驱动因素。然而，重要的是，这种竞争的积极效应受到（1）编码员的技能水平的调节，即竞争对技能更高的编码员更有益，对技能较低的编码员有害，以及（2）编码员经历地位变化的风险的调节，即面临可能地位丧失的编码员在与对手竞争时表现下降。因此，我们通过揭示竞争可能损害表现的条件，扩展了对竞争的研究，这对于理解其在组织中的作用至关重要。本文由Sameer Srivastava，组织接受。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00344找到。

papers.title_en: A Separation of Utility and Beliefs Through Betting Consistency
papers.title_zh: 通过赌注一致性分离效用与信念
papers.abstract_en: For standard preferences under uncertainty, minimal requirements are proposed to identify cardinal utility and subjective, potentially nonadditive, beliefs. This is achieved through an application of betting consistency. This preference principle says that outcome midpoints derived from preferences over bets on an event are also midpoints when elicited from bets on a different event. This consistency requirement provides a simplified elicitation tool, while it also serves as a robustness test for utility measurements. An analyst can use betting consistency to identify a client’s cardinal utility index independent of the client’s beliefs. This follows from our simplified foundation for the biseparable utility model, the widely adopted framework for empirical measurements of utility under various sources of uncertainty. As a theoretical tool, betting consistency can be adopted to provide simple and intuitive foundations for new and for existing decision theories. For instance, an event-dependent version of betting consistency, if it is supplemented with Savage’s sure-thing principle or a version of that principle restricted to acts that satisfy Schmeidler’s comonotonicity property, delivers subjective expected utility or Choquet expected utility, as desired. We also demonstrate how models with specific nonadditive beliefs can easily be derived through bespoke formulations of betting consistency. This paper was accepted by Manel Baucells, behavioral economics and decision analysis.
papers.abstract_zh: 在不确定性下的标准化偏好中，提出了识别基数效用和主观的、可能是非可加的信仰的最小要求。这是通过应用下注一致性来实现的。这一偏好原则表明，从对某一事件的赌注偏好中得出的结果中点，在从不同事件的赌注中引出时也是中点。这种一致性要求提供了一个简化的引出工具，同时它也作为效用测量的鲁棒性测试。分析人员可以使用下注一致性来识别客户的基数效用指数，而与客户的信仰无关。这是基于我们对双可分效用模型的简化基础，这是广泛采用的框架，用于在各种不确定性来源下对效用进行实证测量。作为一个理论工具，下注一致性可以被采用，为新的和现有的决策理论提供简单直观的基础。例如，如果事件依赖版本的下注一致性得到萨维奇的确定事物原则或限制在满足施梅德勒的共同单调性属性的行为上的该原则版本的补充，就可以得到主观期望效用或乔凯特期望效用，如所期望的。我们还展示了如何通过定制的下注一致性公式轻松推导出具有特定非可加信仰的模型。本文由行为经济学和决策分析的Manel Baucells接受。

papers.title_en: Nominal Prices, Retail Investor Participation, and Return Momentum
papers.title_zh: 名义价格、零售投资者参与度与回报动量
papers.abstract_en: We employ an identification strategy for retail participation to explore the link between return momentum and investing clientele. This scheme relies on strictly enforced round-lot rules in China, which financially constrain retail investors from participating in stocks with high nominal prices. We find that there is strong momentum in high-priced stocks but no momentum on aggregate. This result supports the idea that noise trades of retail investors mask momentum, whereas other more sophisticated investors contribute to momentum. We validate this notion by showing that retail investors with small (large) portfolios are less (more) prone to participating in stocks with high nominal prices. Further, small investor participation increases and momentum weakens following splits in high-priced stocks. Finally, we find that the positive relation between nominal prices and momentum extends to a considerable majority of international markets with round-lot rules. This paper was accepted by Lukas Schmid, finance. Funding: Y.-J. Liu acknowledges support from the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72172004]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01423 .
papers.abstract_zh: 我们采用一种零售参与的识别策略来探索回报动量与投资客户之间的关系。这一方案依赖于中国严格执行的整数股规则，这在财务上限制了零售投资者参与高面值股票。我们发现高面值股票有很强的动量效应，但在总体上没有动量。这一结果支持了零售投资者的噪声交易掩盖了动量效应的观点，而其他更复杂的投资者则有助于动量效应。我们通过展示小（大）投资组合的零售投资者更不（更）可能参与高面值股票来验证这一观点。此外，在高面值股票拆分后，小投资者的参与增加，动量效应减弱。最后，我们发现面值与动量之间的正相关关系扩展到了大多数实行整数股规则的国际市场。本文由Lukas Schmid接受，财务。资金：刘宇军承认得到国家自然科学基金的资助[Grant 72172004]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01423找到。

papers.title_en: Information Technology in Banking and Entrepreneurship
papers.title_zh: 信息技术在银行与创业中的应用
papers.abstract_en: We study the importance of information technology (IT) in banking for entrepreneurship. Guided by a parsimonious model, we establish that job creation by young firms is stronger in U.S. counties more exposed to banks with greater IT adoption. We present evidence consistent with banks’ IT adoption spurring entrepreneurship through a collateral channel: entrepreneurship increases by more in IT-exposed counties when house prices rise. Further analysis suggests that IT improves banks’ ability to determine collateral values, in particular when collateral appraisal is more complex. IT also reduces the time and cost of disbursing collateralized loans. This paper was accepted by Bo Becker, finance. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02555 .
papers.abstract_zh: 我们研究了信息技术（IT）在银行业对创业的重要性。在简约模型的指导下，我们确定，在美国更多接触采用IT较多的银行的县份中，年轻公司创造的就业机会更强。我们提供的证据与银行采用IT通过抵押品渠道促进创业一致：当房价上涨时，IT接触较多的县份中创业增加得更多。进一步分析表明，IT提高了银行确定抵押品价值的能力，特别是在抵押品评估更加复杂时。IT还减少了发放抵押贷款所需的时间和成本。本文由Bo Becker接受，财务。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02555找到。

papers.title_zh: 许可去尝试：危机时期试水创业
