papers.title_zh: 规模、范围、速度和定制化（任选两项）：资源配置推动地方同情创业效能的权衡

papers.title_en: Emancipatory entrepreneurship by a stigmatized social group
papers.title_zh: 解放性创业：被污名化社会群体的创业实践

papers.title_en: The power of consumer solidarity framing in scaling up social impact
papers.title_zh: 消费者团结框架在扩大社会影响力中的力量
papers.abstract_en: We study how a French social venture helped scale up social impact by selling fair-priced milk. Besides market success, the venture became a symbol of fair pricing for farmers, influencing public discourse and inspiring new laws. We develop a process model where energized consumer solidarity framing serves as a catalyst for mobilizing ecosystem actors, leading to the widespread adoption of the venture's solution to an economic and social crisis. This distributed process of scaling up social impact unfolds outside the venture's direct control, relying on community enactment as well as engagement and energizing from the media, incumbent retailers and competitors, as well as politicians. We contribute to research on scaling up social impact by explaining how and why entrepreneurial framing can mobilize diverse ecosystem actors. We also advance entrepreneurial framing research by offering a social-emotional explanation of how framing can enable change. • French co-op helping farmers scaled up social impact with limited resources • Social entrepreneur used energized consumer solidarity framing to engage ecosystem actors • Diagnostic, prognostic, and motivational frames mobilized ecosystem actors • Continuous energizing between the entrepreneur and ecosystem actors enabled scaling up • Positive and negative emotions can be regulated in entrepreneurial framing
papers.abstract_zh: 我们研究了一个法国社会企业如何通过销售价格公道的牛奶来扩大其社会影响力。除了市场成功外，该企业还成为了农民公平定价的象征，影响了公共话语并激发了新法律的产生。我们开发了一个过程模型，其中充满活力的消费者团结框架作为催化剂，动员生态系统参与者，导致企业解决方案在经济和社会危机中的广泛采用。这种扩大社会影响的分布式过程在企业直接控制之外展开，依赖于社区的实施以及媒体、现有零售商和竞争对手以及政治家的参与和激励。我们通过解释创业框架如何动员多样化的生态系统参与者，以及为什么能够这样做，为扩大社会影响的研究做出了贡献。我们还通过提供框架如何使变革成为可能的社会情感解释，推进了创业框架研究。• 法国合作社帮助农民用有限的资源扩大了社会影响• 社会企业家使用充满活力的消费者团结框架来吸引生态系统参与者• 诊断性、预测性和激励性框架动员了生态系统参与者• 企业家和生态系统参与者之间的持续激励使扩大成为可能• 创业框架中可以调节积极和消极情绪

papers.title_en: Rewards-based crowdfunding as an institutional carrier: The cross-border backing of environmental projects
papers.title_zh: 基于回报的众筹作为制度载体：环境项目的跨境支持

papers.title_en: Bridging micro–macro dynamics in nanotechnology commercialisation: How governance and absorptive capacity shape innovation performance
papers.title_zh: 纳米技术商业化中的微观-宏观动态桥梁：治理和吸收能力如何塑造创新绩效
papers.abstract_en: Despite the transformative promise of nanotechnology, its commercialisation across Europe remains constrained by a persistent gap between micro-level organisational dynamics and macro-level contextual influences. This study integrates the resource-based view (RBV) with a dynamic capabilities perspective to examine how internal governance structures and absorptive capacity interact with regional policies and geographical proximity to shape innovation performance in collaborative R&D partnerships. Using a mixed-methods design across 12 European countries, we combine panel data from 250 nanotechnology firms (sourced from Orbis and World Bank databases) with 30 in-depth interviews and 97 survey responses. Fixed-effects regression models reveal that decentralised governance structures foster intellectual property generation and enhance long-term profitability. Furthermore, absorptive capacity amplifies these effects under supportive regional policy environments. Dense value networks, however, can inhibit new product development due to coordination overload – an effect mitigated by geographical proximity. These findings refine the RBV by highlighting the contingent nature of internal–external synergies in volatile, high-technology sectors. The study provides actionable insights for R&D managers and EU policymakers seeking to align governance flexibility and absorptive capacity with the evolving goals of Horizon Europe. • The study uncovers the micro–macro dynamics shaping the commercialisation of nanotechnology R&D across Europe. • We investigate how governance mechanisms and absorptive capacity jointly drive commercialisation outcomes in collaborative R&D initiatives. • The results show that decentralised governance structures strengthen intellectual property creation and improve long-term profitability. • Absorptive capacity further amplifies these gains under supportive regional policy environments; meanwhile, dense value networks can hinder new product development unless offset by geographic proximity. • By linking firm-level strategies to regional innovation policies through a multi-country European analysis, the study addresses a key gap in the nanotechnology commercialisation literature.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管纳米技术具有变革性的前景，但其在欧洲的商业化仍受到微观组织动态与宏观环境影响之间持续存在的差距的制约。本研究将基于资源的观点（RBV）与动态能力视角相结合，以检验内部治理结构和吸收能力如何与区域政策和地理邻近性相互作用，以塑造协作研发伙伴关系中的创新绩效。我们采用12个欧洲国家的混合方法设计，结合来自Orbis和世界银行数据库的250家纳米技术公司的面板数据、30次深入访谈和97份调查问卷。固定效应回归模型揭示，分散的治理结构促进了知识产权的产生并增强了长期盈利能力。此外，在支持性的区域政策环境下，吸收能力放大了这些效应。然而，密集的价值网络可能会因协调过载而阻碍新产品开发——这种效应可以通过地理邻近性来缓解。这些发现通过强调在动荡的高技术领域内部-外部协同作用的情境性质，完善了RBV。该研究为寻求将治理灵活性和吸收能力与欧洲地平线计划不断演变的目标对齐的研发经理和欧盟政策制定者提供了可行的见解。• 该研究揭示了塑造欧洲纳米技术研发商业化的微观-宏观动态。• 我们调查了治理机制和吸收能力如何共同推动协作研发计划中的商业化成果。• 结果表明，分散的治理结构加强了知识产权的创造并改善了长期盈利能力。• 在支持性的区域政策环境下，吸收能力进一步放大了这些收益；同时，密集的价值网络可能会阻碍新产品开发，除非通过地理邻近性来抵消。• 通过多国欧洲分析将公司层面的策略与区域创新政策联系起来，该研究填补了纳米技术商业化文献中的一个重要空白。

papers.title_en: Innovation in climate adaptation technologies: A catalyst for financial market dynamics?
papers.title_zh: 气候适应技术中的创新：金融市场动态的催化剂？

papers.title_en: Barriers to innovation, coping strategies, and the national context: Evidence from Singapore
papers.title_zh: 创新障碍、应对策略与国家背景：来自新加坡的证据

papers.title_en: Public perception, government support, and the formation of AI startups: An institution-based view
papers.title_zh: 公众认知、政府支持与人工智能初创企业的形成：基于制度视角的分析
papers.abstract_en: This study investigates cross-country differences in artificial intelligence (AI) startup formation through an institution-based view. Public perception of science and technology (S&T) is conceptualised as an informal institution influencing societal acceptance of innovation, while government AI strategies are framed as formal institutions shaping policy, resources, and regulation. Using data from 40 developed and emerging economies, and controlling for macroeconomic, innovation, and talent-related factors, multiple regression analyses show higher startup activity in countries with more positive public views of S&T and stronger, well-resourced AI strategies. Spiritual concerns about S&T have a stronger negative relationship with AI entrepreneurship than material concerns, highlighting the role of cultural influences in technology adoption. The findings suggest that alignment between formal and informal institutions is essential for entrepreneurial success in frontier technologies. Policy implications include fostering public trust through education and ethical governance, and strengthening AI ecosystems through targeted investments in talent, infrastructure, and enabling regulation. • Informal and formal institutions jointly shape AI startup formation across countries. • Negative public perceptions of science and technology reduce AI startup activity. • Government AI strategies are positively associated with national AI startup formation. • Spiritual concerns about science inhibit AI entrepreneurship more than material concerns.
papers.abstract_zh: 本研究通过基于制度的视角，探讨了不同国家人工智能（AI）创业公司形成的差异。将公众对科学技术（S&T）的看法概念化为影响社会对创新接受度的非正式制度，而政府的AI战略则被视为塑造政策、资源和监管的正式制度。利用来自40个发达和新兴经济体的数据，并控制宏观经济、创新和人才相关因素，多元回归分析显示，在公众对S&T持更积极看法和拥有更强大、资源充足的AI战略的国家中，创业活动更为活跃。对S&T的精神性关切与AI创业之间的负面关系比物质性关切更强，突出了文化影响在技术采纳中的作用。研究结果表明，正式和非正式制度之间的一致性对于前沿技术领域的创业成功至关重要。政策含义包括通过教育和伦理治理培养公众信任，并通过有针对性的人才、基础设施和监管投资加强AI生态系统。• 非正式和正式制度共同塑造了各国AI创业公司的形成。• 公众对科学技术的负面看法减少了AI创业活动。• 政府AI战略与国家AI创业形成呈正相关。• 对科学的灵性关切比物质关切更抑制AI创业。

papers.title_en: Divergent temporal dynamics: Capturing the link between AI investment intensity and green innovation volatility
papers.title_zh: 不同时间动态：捕捉人工智能投资强度与绿色创新波动之间的联系

papers.title_en: Dynamic Shifts: Understanding the network position as social capital to enhancing the innovation performance of frontier AI labs
papers.title_zh: 动态转变：理解网络位置作为社会资本以增强前沿人工智能实验室的创新绩效

papers.title_en: In and out: The relationship between university in-licensing and out-licensing by firms in therapeutic biotechnology
papers.title_zh: 进出之间：大学在治疗性生物技术领域内许可与企业外许可之间的关系

papers.title_en: Governing innovation: How technology maturity shapes R&D contracts
papers.title_zh: 治理创新：技术成熟度如何塑造研发合同
papers.abstract_en: Firms investing in market-upstream R&D face governance challenges that vary systematically with the stage of technological development. This study examines how technology maturity shapes the design of interfirm R&D contracts, particularly in balancing appropriation and coordination concerns. Drawing on Transaction Cost Economics (TCE) and incomplete contracting theory, we view contracts as inherently incomplete and use the discriminating alignment principle as a lens to investigate which governance mechanisms are most effective at different levels of technology maturity. Leveraging a large-scale, unique dataset of R&D contracts in the semiconductor industry, we apply a correlated topic model (CTM) to systematically analyze and compare contractual mechanisms across multiple levels of technology maturity. We find that appropriation mechanisms are more prominent at low to intermediate maturity levels, where knowledge remains tacit and appropriation concerns are high. Conversely, coordination mechanisms become increasingly critical at intermediate and high maturity levels, where demands related to integration, execution, and commercialization intensify. We also demonstrate that different levels of technology maturity are associated with distinct framings of key contractual elements—such as intellectual property rights and project management clauses. By introducing the technology readiness level (TRL) framework as an empirical lens for studying contract design, this study advances alliance governance and incomplete contracting theory by revealing stage-contingent variation in contractual governance across the innovation process. • Technology maturity systematically shapes the design of interfirm R&D contracts. • We investigated a unique set of R&D contracts using correlated topic modelling. • The extent of appropriation and coordination mechanisms varies across the stages. • But also the framing of key contractual clauses evolves with technology maturity. • Technology Readiness Levels offer a structured basis for explaining stage-contingent governance needs.
papers.abstract_zh: 投资于市场上游研发的企业面临随着技术发展阶段系统变化的治理挑战。本研究考察了技术成熟度如何塑造企业间研发合同的设计，特别是在平衡收益分配和协调问题方面。借鉴交易成本经济学（TCE）和不完全契约理论，我们将合同视为本质上不完整的，并使用区分对齐原则作为透镜来调查在不同技术成熟度水平下哪些治理机制最为有效。利用半导体行业研发合同的大规模、独特数据集，我们应用相关主题模型（CTM）系统地分析和比较不同技术成熟度水平下的合同机制。我们发现，在技术成熟度低至中等水平，知识仍然隐性且收益分配问题高的情况下，收益分配机制更为突出。相反，在技术成熟度中等和高水平，与整合、执行和商业化相关的需求加剧时，协调机制变得越来越关键。我们还证明，不同技术成熟度水平与关键合同要素的不同框架相关联，例如知识产权权利和项目管理条款。通过引入技术准备水平（TRL）框架作为研究合同设计的实证透镜，本研究通过揭示创新过程中合同治理的阶段性变化，推进了联盟治理和不完全契约理论。• 技术成熟度系统地塑造了企业间研发合同的设计。• 我们使用相关主题建模调查了一组独特的研发合同。• 收益分配和协调机制的程度在不同阶段有所不同。• 但关键合同条款的框架也随着技术成熟度而演变。• 技术准备水平为解释阶段性治理需求提供了结构化基础。

papers.title_en: Knowledge spillovers from green technologies
papers.title_zh: 绿色技术的知识溢出

papers.title_en: Value co-creation in B2B industrial digital platforms: A platform-native perspective under service-dominant logic
papers.title_zh: B2B工业数字平台中的价值共创：基于服务主导逻辑的平台原生视角
papers.abstract_en: Emerging B2B industrial digital platforms (IDPs) are vital enablers of digital transformation in traditional manufacturing. However, existing research has predominantly focused on IDPs led by industrial incumbents, leaving a gap in understanding IDPs led by platform-native firms. For such non-industrial network technology firms built around a platform business model from the start, value co-creation with industrial users possessing domain knowledge is essential to develop IDPs. Through the theoretical lens of service-dominant logic, we conducted a longitudinal, exploratory case study of Alibaba's Taofactory Platform. The study explores the dynamic process through which platform natives, as cross-boundary entrants in the B2B industrial market, develop IDPs via value co-creation. Our analysis reveals that, driven by evolving service foci across stages, the platform owner orchestrates three core value co-creation strategies: resource integration, service exchange, and institutional arrangements. This orchestration fosters the evolution of value co-creation modes from connection-based to interaction-based and finally to collaboration-based, which in turn shapes the evolution of platform types from an industrial transaction platform to an industrial solution platform, and ultimately to an industrial platform ecosystem. This study offers a theoretical framework that advances research on digital platform development, value co-creation, and service-dominant logic. It also provides practical insights for platform natives aiming to enter the B2B industrial market. • Examines development process of industrial digital platforms led by platform natives. • Demarcates platform types: industrial transaction platform, industrial solution platform, industrial platform ecosystem. • Identifies three value co-creation modes: connection-based, interaction-based, collaboration-based. • Focuses on how platform natives develop industrial digital platforms through orchestrating value co-creation among actors.
papers.abstract_zh: 新兴的B2B工业数字平台（IDPs）是传统制造业数字化转型的关键推动者。然而，现有研究主要关注由工业现有企业领导的IDPs，留下了对由平台原生企业领导的IDPs理解的空白。对于这些从一开始就围绕平台商业模式构建的非工业网络技术公司来说，与拥有领域知识的工业用户共同创造价值对于发展IDPs至关重要。通过服务主导逻辑的理论视角，我们对阿里巴巴的淘工厂平台进行了纵向的探索性案例研究。该研究探讨了平台原生企业作为B2B工业市场的跨界进入者，通过价值共创发展IDPs的动态过程。我们的分析揭示了，在服务焦点不断演变的推动下，平台所有者协调了三种核心价值共创策略：资源整合、服务交换和制度安排。这种协调促进了价值共创模式从基于连接的到基于互动的，最终到基于协作的演变，这反过来又塑造了平台类型从工业交易平台到工业解决方案平台，最终到工业平台生态系统的演变。本研究提供了一个理论框架，推进了数字平台发展、价值共创和服务主导逻辑的研究。它还为旨在进入B2B工业市场的平台原生企业提供了实际洞见。• 考察了由平台原生企业领导的工业数字平台的发展过程。• 划分平台类型：工业交易平台、工业解决方案平台、工业平台生态系统。• 识别了三种价值共创模式：基于连接的、基于互动的、基于协作的。• 专注于平台原生企业如何通过协调参与者之间的价值共创来发展工业数字平台。

papers.title_en: Managerial decision-making and AI: A taxonomy of AI collaboration orientations and strategic integration
papers.title_zh: 管理决策与人工智能：人工智能协作取向与战略整合的分类
papers.abstract_en: Artificial intelligence (AI) holds significant promise for enhancing business decision-making, yet managers differ in their perceptions and approaches to collaborating with AI systems. Organizations thus face a managerial challenge: how to account for individual AI collaboration orientations to maximize the benefits of human–AI collaboration while addressing fears of replacement. This study develops a taxonomy of AI collaboration orientations among marketing decision-makers, based on survey data from 472 professionals. A person-centered analysis reveals four distinct profiles: AI Trailblazers, who view AI as a strategic partner; AI Strategists, who balance AI insights with human judgement; Pragmatic Adopters, who value efficiency but remain cautious; and AI Skeptics, who express concerns over sense of control and transparency. These orientations are shaped by collaboration preferences, sense of control, explainability, and organisational support. We also find that managers in organizations that promote AI experimentation report greater satisfaction with market performance. This study advances research on AI trust, human–AI collaboration, and managerial technology adoption. The taxonomy offers firms a practical tool to assess and support AI collaboration readiness and to develop adaptive leadership in an evolving digital environment. • Managerial differences in approaching AI collaboration remain underexplored. • Four distinct AI collaboration orientations emerge among marketing decision-makers. • AI Trailblazers and AI Strategists show the highest levels of strategic engagement. • Collaboration preferences, agency, and transparency shape adoption mindsets. • Organizational support for AI experimentation boosts performance satisfaction.
papers.abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）在提升商业决策方面具有巨大潜力，然而管理者在与AI系统合作的看法和方法上存在差异。因此，组织面临管理挑战：如何在考虑个体AI合作倾向的同时，最大化人-AI合作的益处，并解决被替代的担忧。本研究基于472名专业人士的调查数据，开发了营销决策者AI合作倾向的分类体系。以人为中心的分析揭示了四种不同的特征：AI先锋者，将AI视为战略伙伴；AI策略家，平衡AI洞察与人类判断；实用采纳者，重视效率但保持谨慎；AI怀疑者，对控制感和透明度表示担忧。这些倾向受到合作偏好、控制感、可解释性和组织支持的影响。我们还发现，在促进AI实验的组织中，管理者对市场表现的满意度更高。本研究推进了AI信任、人-AI合作和管理技术采纳的研究。分类体系为企业提供了一个实用工具，以评估和支持AI合作准备度，并在不断演变的数字环境中发展适应性领导力。• 管理者在AI合作方法上的差异尚未充分探索。• 在营销决策者中出现了四种不同的AI合作倾向。• AI先锋者和AI策略家显示出最高水平的战略参与度。• 合作偏好、代理和透明度塑造了采纳心态。• 组织对AI实验的支持提高了绩效满意度。

papers.title_en: Balancing spatial equalities by place-based inclusive innovation policy: the cases of Israel and Korea
papers.title_zh: 基于地域的包容性创新政策平衡空间平等：以色列和韩国的案例
papers.abstract_en: Abstract While innovation-led economies enjoy significant growth rates, they often suffer from rising social inequities. Inclusive innovation policies are government interventions designed to address such inequities, including place-based ones. Because place-based inclusive innovation could have differential effects related to different spatial levels—for example increasing inter-regional but reducing intra-regional equity simultaneously—the impact of innovation-driven place-based policies on three spatial levels should be considered: international, inter-regional, and intra-regional. Furthermore, we contend that to achieve “balanced equalities”—that is to improve equity on both inter- and intra-regional spatial levels—it is necessary to consider not just social equity, but also economic and political perspectives. From a policy standpoint, advancing this goal requires answering the questions of where governments should invest and what to invest in. Employing Israel and South Korea as illustrative case studies, we show that focusing the government’s innovation investment on large, yet peripheral, cities and balanced investment in firms and people are plausible answers to these questions.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：虽然以创新为主导的经济体享有显著的增长率，但它们常常遭受日益严重的社会不平等。包容性创新政策是政府为解决这些不平等问题而设计的干预措施，包括基于地方的措施。由于基于地方的包容性创新可能对不同空间层面产生不同的影响——例如，同时增加区域间但减少区域内的公平——应考虑创新驱动的地方政策对三个空间层面的影响：国际、区域间和区域内。此外，我们认为，要实现“平衡的平等”——即在区域间和区域内空间层面上改善公平——不仅需要考虑社会公平，还需要考虑经济和政治视角。从政策角度来看，推进这一目标需要回答政府应该在哪里投资以及投资什么的问题。以以色列和韩国为例，我们展示了将政府的创新投资集中在大型但边缘的城市，以及在企业和人员之间平衡投资，是这些问题的合理答案。

papers.title_en: Workplace governance and labor perceptions of technological risks and benefits
papers.title_zh: 工作场所治理与劳动力对技术风险和利益的认知
papers.abstract_en: Abstract This paper examines the connection between emerging workplace technologies and workers’ preferences, actions, and mobilization. Some workers organize against innovations in the workplace because they fear that the deployment of emerging technologies could exacerbate inequality. But more often, workers adopt or acquiesce to emerging technologies. Our paper argues that understanding workers’ responses (and non-responses) to technology requires taking the work context seriously. Drawing on interdisciplinary research, it conceptualizes different forms of workplace power that moderate the consequences of technological adoption, connecting these forms of power to various dimensions of workers’ preferences. It then reflects upon the methodological challenges of studying preferences and power. The analysis underscores the need for mid-level theoretical and empirical research of work contexts to advance the agenda on inclusive innovation.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 本文探讨了新兴工作场所技术与工人偏好、行为和动员之间的联系。一些工人反对工作场所的创新，因为他们担心新兴技术的部署可能加剧不平等。但更多时候，工人采用或默许新兴技术。本文认为，要理解工人对技术的反应（和无反应），需要认真考虑工作背景。它借鉴跨学科研究，概念化了不同形式的工作场所权力，这些权力调节技术采纳的后果，并将这些权力形式与工人偏好的各个维度联系起来。然后，它反思了研究偏好和权力的方法论挑战。分析强调了需要对工作背景进行中层理论和实证研究，以推进包容性创新议程。

papers.title_en: Innovation and equity: places and practices an introduction to the special section
papers.title_zh: 创新与公平：地方与实践——特刊导言
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Can innovation be made more equitable? The papers in this special issue center equity at the heart of a positive research agenda around innovation. This research agenda relates to practices - the routinized behaviors of social actors - in the innovation process. In this introduction, we discuss how these practices focus on a) access to innovative processes, b) targets of innovation, c) the deployment of technology in firms, d) ownership structures, and e) broader governance. Moreover, practices always occur in a specific place, understood as the distinctive social or power relations that shape how practices, and resistance towards them, emerge.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 创新能否变得更加公平？本期特刊中的论文将公平置于创新研究议程的核心。这一研究议程涉及创新过程中的实践——社会行动者的常规化行为。在本文介绍中，我们讨论了这些实践如何关注：a) 进入创新过程的途径，b) 创新的目标，c) 企业中技术的部署，d) 所有权结构，以及 e) 更广泛的治理。此外，实践总是发生在特定的地方，理解为塑造实践及其对实践的抵制如何出现的独特的社会或权力关系。

papers.title_en: From innovation versus equity to innovation and equity
papers.title_zh: 从创新“对立”公平到创新“与”公平
papers.abstract_en: Abstract The essays in the special issue reframe the relationship between innovation and equity, not as opposing objectives but as mutually constitutive design choices. Drawing together contributions at the levels of the workplace, city, region, and nation, they emphasize how outcomes depend less on market or technological inevitabilities than on practices situated in places. The essays converge on the insight that innovation systems are inherently political, shaped by institutions, governance, and collective action. Yet they also surface unsettled questions: how equity at one scale may undermine it at another, how to govern multi-actor systems such as data and surveillance, how to stabilize inclusive arrangements over time, and how to measure intangible assets and civic participation alongside wages or GDP. The task ahead is to design across levels, institutions, and metrics to recognize equity not as a constraint but as a source of resilience.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：本期特刊中的文章重新构建了创新与公平之间的关系，不是作为对立的目标，而是作为相互构成的设计选择。它们汇集了工作场所、城市、地区和国家层面的贡献，强调结果更多地取决于地方实践，而不是市场或技术的必然性。文章一致认为，创新系统本质上是政治性的，受制度、治理和集体行动的影响。然而，它们也提出了未解决的问题：一个层面的公平可能破坏另一个层面的公平，如何治理涉及多方参与者的系统，如数据和监控，如何随着时间的推移稳定包容性安排，以及如何衡量无形资产和公民参与，以及工资或GDP。未来的任务是在不同层面、机构和指标之间进行设计，将公平视为韧性的源泉，而不是约束。

papers.title_en: Regulation as opportunity: proactive GDPR compliance in the US financial services industry
papers.title_zh: 标题：监管即机遇：美国金融服务业主动遵守GDPR
papers.abstract_en: Abstract We study the impact of the EU’s General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) on US Fortune 500 credit intermediaries and payment networks and find that corporations more exposed to the regulation due to higher market shares in Europe experienced larger increases in revenues and operating incomes after the regulation was introduced. Post-hoc analyses of survey data suggest that firms more exposed to the GDPR have higher levels of data standardization, technical investments in machine learning and artificial intelligence (ML/AI), and revenue-enhancing (but not cost-cutting) ML/AI innovations five years after GDPR introduction. Firms’ investments in GDPR compliance may have catalyzed organization-wide transformation of data systems and routines. Our findings suggest that data regulation may incentivize large old corporations to commit to changing inertial and complex internal processes despite incurring short-run costs, which delivers long-run benefits by enabling more effective ML/AI innovations that rely on high-quality data as inputs.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 我们研究了欧盟通用数据保护条例（GDPR）对美国财富500强信贷中介和支付网络的影响，发现那些在欧洲市场份额更高、因此更受该法规影响的公司，在法规实施后收入和营业收入的增长更大。对调查数据进行事后分析表明，更受GDPR影响的公司在GDPR实施五年后，数据标准化水平更高，对机器学习和人工智能（ML/AI）的技术投资更多，并且拥有更多增加收入（而非降低成本）的ML/AI创新。公司对GDPR合规的投资可能催化了整个组织的数据系统和例行程序的转型。我们的发现表明，数据法规可能激励大型老牌公司致力于改变惯性和复杂的内部流程，尽管这会带来短期成本，但通过实现更有效的依赖高质量数据输入的ML/AI创新，从而带来长期效益。

papers.title_en: An equity-focused research agenda for workplace surveillance
papers.title_zh: 以权益为中心的工作场所监控研究议程
papers.abstract_en: Abstract We propose an equity-focused research agenda for workplace surveillance that attends to both historical continuities and contemporary shifts. Contemporary workplace surveillance continues longstanding patterns of managerial oversight present since the Industrial Revolution, but has evolved in important ways. We emphasize three shifts: the extension of surveillance into new work sectors, the network of actors beyond the manager-worker dyad, and a broader accounting of surveillance harms and potential benefits. An equity-focused approach to workplace surveillance should derive with the principle that being seen entails recognition of workers’ well-being.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 我们提出了一个以公平为重点的工作场所监控研究议程，关注历史连续性和当代转变。当代工作场所监控延续了工业革命以来长期存在的管理监督模式，但在重要方面发生了演变。我们强调三个转变：监控扩展到新的工作领域，超越管理者-工人二元关系的行动者网络，以及对监控危害和潜在利益的更广泛核算。以公平为重点的工作场所监控方法应基于被看见意味着承认工人福祉的原则。

papers.title_en: Long-run patterns in the discovery of the adjacent possible
papers.title_zh: 长期模式在发现相邻可能性中的表现
papers.abstract_en: Abstract The notion of the “adjacent possible” has been advanced to theorize the generation of novelty across many different research domains. This study is an attempt to examine in what way the notion can be made empirically useful for innovation studies. A new theoretical framework is construed based on the notion of innovation as a search process where knowledge is recombined to discover the adjacent possible. The framework makes testable predictions about the rate of innovation, the distribution of innovations across organizations, and the rate of diversification of product portfolios. The empirical section examines how well this framework predicts long-run patterns of new product introductions in Sweden, 1908–2016, and explores the long-run evolution of the product space of Swedish organizations. The results suggest that, remarkably, the rate of innovation depends linearly on cumulative innovations, which explains advantages of incumbent firms but excludes the emergence of winner-take-all distributions. The results also suggest that the rate of development of new types of products follows Heaps’ law, where the share of new product types within organizations declines over time. Finally, the study also demonstrates that the structure of the Swedish product space carries important information about adjacent possible innovations.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 “邻近可能”这一概念已被提出，用以理论化多个不同研究领域中新事物的产生。本研究试图检验这一概念如何能够为创新研究提供实证上的用途。基于创新作为搜索过程的理论框架被构建起来，其中知识被重新组合以发现邻近可能。该框架对创新速率、组织间创新的分布以及产品组合多样化速率做出了可检验的预测。实证部分检验了这一框架如何预测瑞典1908-2016年新产品引入的长期模式，并探讨了瑞典组织产品空间的长期演变。结果表明，令人惊讶的是，创新速率与累积创新呈线性关系，这解释了现有企业的优势，但排除了赢家通吃分布的出现。结果还表明，新类型产品的发展速率遵循Heaps定律，即组织内新类型产品的比例随时间下降。最后，研究还证明，瑞典产品空间的结构携带了关于邻近可能创新的重要信息。

papers.title_en: Fostering creativity through the exploitation of scientific and technological knowledge
papers.title_zh: 通过开发科技知识促进创造力
papers.abstract_en: Abstract The most creative inventions—i.e., inventions that are both novel and highly valuable—in the lithium-ion battery field are developed by inventors that exploit their own field-specific knowledge base, leveraging scientific and technological knowledge components they previously developed. This observation contrasts with the findings of prior literature, which has argued that exploration driven by inventors new to a field tends to drive novel and breakthrough inventions. We argue that the technological context and characteristics of the recombinant search process underlying technology development provide important theoretical boundaries to these prior findings and should be considered. In a complex and science-driven technology field, we expect an inventor’s own accumulated scientific and technological field-specific knowledge base to play an important role in advancing that technology field and to matter more for generating novel and breakthrough inventions.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：在锂离子电池领域，最具创造力的发明——即既新颖又极具价值的发明——是由利用自身特定领域知识基础的发明者开发的，他们利用之前开发的科学和技术知识要素。这一观察与先前文献的发现形成对比，后者认为，由新进入该领域的发明者驱动的探索倾向于推动新颖和突破性的发明。我们认为，技术发展背后的重组搜索过程的技术背景和特征为这些先前的发现提供了重要的理论界限，应该被考虑。在一个复杂且由科学驱动的技术领域，我们预期发明者自身积累的科学和技术领域特定知识基础在推进该技术领域方面发挥重要作用，并且在产生新颖和突破性发明方面更为重要。

papers.title_en: Patent eligibility uncertainty and the VC financing of novel technologies
papers.title_zh: 专利资格不确定性与风险资本对新技术的融资
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Patents play an essential part in startups’ success, particularly those developing novel technologies. However, novel technologies face an evolving regulatory context that can raise questions about the eligibility and hence the validity of the granted rights (i.e. patent eligibility uncertainty). We study the effect of patent eligibility uncertainty on startups’ ability to attract venture capital (VC) financing using the context of genomic sequences. Since 1980, the United States Patents and Trademark Office (USPTO) has allowed patents on nucleotide sequences—the building blocks of the genome. This practice was disturbed in 2010 when the court system intervened in The Association for Molecular Pathology v. Myriad Genetics. Between 2010 and 2013, the lower courts issued a series of contradictory rulings based on inconsistent legal reasoning, creating uncertainty about the patent eligibility of thousands of granted patents on nucleotide sequences. We exploit this intervention to investigate the effects of patent eligibility uncertainty on VC investments in new biotech ventures. The court system’s intervention motivates a quasi-experimental approach that allows us to show the negative impact of patent eligibility uncertainty on VC investments in startups owning affected patents.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：专利在初创企业的成功中扮演着至关重要的角色，尤其是那些开发新技术的企业。然而，新技术面临着不断演变的监管环境，这可能会引发关于授权权利（即专利资格）的资格和有效性的问题（即专利资格的不确定性）。我们以基因组序列为背景，研究专利资格不确定性对初创企业吸引风险资本（VC）融资能力的影响。自1980年以来，美国专利商标局（USPTO）一直允许对构成基因组的基本单元核苷酸序列进行专利保护。2010年，法院系统在“分子病理学协会诉Myriad Genetics案”中介入，打破了这一做法。在2010年至2013年期间，下级法院基于不一致的法律推理发布了一系列相互矛盾的裁决，造成了对数千个已授权的核苷酸序列专利资格的不确定性。我们利用这一干预来调查专利资格不确定性对VC投资于新的生物技术企业的影响。法院系统的干预激发了一种准实验方法，使我们能够展示专利资格不确定性对拥有受影响专利的初创企业VC投资的负面影响。

papers.title_en: Innovation diffusion uncertainty: incremental and radical innovations compared
papers.title_zh: 创新扩散的不确定性：渐进式与激进式创新的比较
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Much research on innovations assumes a dichotomy of disruptive radical innovations versus more incremental ones and focuses on the diffusion of radical ones. However, incremental innovations have their own complexities. Some innovations based on incremental technologies may require radical organizational changes to implement while others are more fully incremental, leading to different technological and organizational uncertainties. Because incremental innovations can be consequential for both industries and individual firms, we develop theory on how the resulting diffusion processes differ. We analyze how the airline industry adopted three strategically important innovations with different technical and organizational uncertainty configurations—one purely incremental, one technologically radical, and one requiring radical organizational changes. The findings show information from prior adopters impacts adoption, as commonly demonstrated in diffusion studies, but only for the two innovations that were radical. The purely incremental case had no such effect. This overall suggests that firms rely on information from peer actions and early experiences to reduce both technological and organizational uncertainty similarly.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：许多关于创新的研究假设了颠覆性激进创新与更渐进式创新之间的二分法，并集中于激进创新的扩散。然而，渐进式创新也有其自身的复杂性。一些基于渐进技术的创新可能需要激进的组织变革来实施，而其他创新则更完全地是渐进式的，导致不同的技术和组织不确定性。由于渐进式创新对行业和个别公司都可能产生重大影响，我们发展了关于结果扩散过程如何不同的理论。我们分析了航空业如何采用三种技术与组织不确定性配置不同的战略重要创新——一个纯粹是渐进式的，一个技术上是激进的，一个需要激进的组织变革。研究结果表明，先前采用者的信息影响采用，这在扩散研究中通常被证明，但仅适用于两个激进的创新。纯粹的渐进式案例没有这种影响。这总体表明，公司依赖于同行行动和早期经验的信息来类似地减少技术和组织不确定性。

papers.title_en: Putting intangible inputs and global value chains into work: New sources of manufacturing comparative advantage in global markets
papers.title_zh: 将无形投入和全球价值链融入工作：全球市场中制造业比较优势的新来源
papers.abstract_en: Abstract This paper studies the contribution of intangible inputs and global value chain (GVC) participation to manufacturing specialization and the creation of comparative advantage in global markets. We use an input–output framework for the quantification of intangibles, which, among others, allows us to distinguish between domestically produced and imported intangible inputs and study disembodied flows of intangibles (knowledge) across domestic and GVCs. This framework is applied to study the determinants of export specialization of a sample of 18 manufacturing sectors from the G7 economies during the period 2000–2014. Our results suggest that intangible inputs are key contributors to the export specialization of the manufacturing sectors of advanced economies, reflecting their role as sources of comparative advantage and the dynamics of the process of servicification as a strategy for enhancing manufacturing specialization. Furthermore, consistent with our theoretical propositions, the results highlight the importance of domestic intangible inputs, but we also identify that imported intangible inputs appear to be non-rivalrous and provide specialization benefits of a lesser magnitude. Backward participation in GVCs is also found to boost export specialization.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 本文研究了无形投入和全球价值链（GVC）参与对制造业专业化以及在全球市场中创造比较优势的贡献。我们使用投入-产出框架来量化无形资产，这使我们能够区分国内生产和进口的无形投入，并研究无形资产（知识）在国内和GVCs中的非物质流动。这一框架被应用于研究2000-2014年期间G7经济体18个制造业部门出口专业化的决定因素。我们的研究结果表明，无形投入是先进经济体制造业部门出口专业化的关键贡献者，反映了它们作为比较优势来源的作用以及服务化进程作为增强制造业专业化战略的动态。此外，与我们的理论命题一致，结果强调了国内无形投入的重要性，但我们也发现进口无形投入似乎是非竞争性的，并提供了较小程度的专业化利益。后向参与GVCs也被发现可以促进出口专业化。

papers.title_en: Gender gaps in the gig economy: consequences for entrepreneurship in the 21st century
papers.title_zh: 标题：零工经济中的性别差距：对21世纪创业的影响
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Although the gender gap in entrepreneurship has been well documented, we still know little about gender differences in gig work and freelancing activities, which continue to grow in importance. Using supply- and demand-side explanations, we hypothesize that gender differences will be smaller in the gig economy than in entrepreneurship. The primary reason is that the gig economy provides flexibility, which women find especially attractive relative to men. Using data from the Entrepreneurship in the Population survey, we find partial support for our hypotheses—relative to business ownership and nascent entrepreneurship, the gender gap is smaller for gig work but similar for freelancing. Moreover, if women do own a business or engage in freelancing, they are equally likely as men to remain entrepreneurs. Thus, the gender gap exists in entry but not exit. Our descriptive evidence suggests nonbinary individuals are more likely than men and women to use gig work as their primary job and more likely to remain business owners, but the regression results do not support these findings. We therefore find the gender gap in entrepreneurship is smaller in the gig economy than in other forms of entrepreneurship and smaller in exit.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：尽管有关创业领域的性别差异已有充分记录，但我们对零工工作和自由职业活动中的性别差异知之甚少，而这些活动的重要性仍在不断增长。基于供给和需求侧的解释，我们假设在零工经济中性别差异将小于创业领域。主要原因是零工经济提供了灵活性，女性相对于男性特别看重这一点。利用人口创业调查的数据，我们发现部分支持我们的假设——与企业所有权和初始创业相比，零工工作的性别差距较小，但自由职业的性别差距相似。此外，如果女性确实拥有企业或从事自由职业，她们与男性一样有可能继续成为创业者。因此，性别差距存在于进入市场而非退出市场。我们的描述性证据表明，非二元性别个体比男性和女性更有可能将零工工作作为主要工作，并且更有可能继续成为企业主，但回归结果不支持这些发现。因此，我们发现零工经济中的创业性别差距小于其他形式的创业，并且在退出市场中的性别差距也较小。

papers.title_en: The value of a park in crises: Quantifying the health and wellbeing benefits of green spaces using exogenous variations in use values
papers.title_zh: 危机中的公园价值：利用使用价值的外生变化量化绿地的健康与福祉效益
papers.abstract_en: Most people consider parks important for their quality of life, yet systematic causal evidence is missing. We exploit exogenous variations in their use values to estimate causal effects. Using a representative household panel with precise geographical coordinates of households linked to satellite images of green spaces with a nationwide coverage, we employ a spatial difference-in-differences design, comparing within-individual changes between residents living close to a green space with those living further away. We exploit Covid-19 as an exogenous shock. We find that green spaces raised overall life satisfaction while reducing symptoms of anxiety (feelings of nervousness and worry) and depression. There is also suggestive evidence for reduced loneliness. Given the number of people in their surroundings, a compensating-surplus calculation suggests that parks added substantial benefits during the period studied.
papers.abstract_zh: 大多数人认为公园对他们的生活质量很重要，但缺乏系统的因果证据。我们利用其使用价值的外生变化来估计因果效应。我们使用一个具有代表性的家庭面板，将家庭的精确地理坐标与全国覆盖的绿地卫星图像联系起来，采用空间差异-差异设计，比较居住在绿地附近的居民与居住在更远地方的居民之间的个体内部变化。我们利用Covid-19作为外生冲击。我们发现，绿地提高了整体生活满意度，同时减少了焦虑（紧张和担忧的感觉）和抑郁症状。还有迹象表明孤独感有所减少。考虑到他们周围人数，补偿剩余计算表明，在研究期间，公园增加了大量好处。

papers.title_en: The Generational Gift: The Effects of Grandparental Care on the Next Generations' Health and Well‐Being
papers.title_zh: 代际馈赠：祖辈照料对下一代健康和福祉的影响
papers.abstract_en: ABSTRACT Health and well‐being in the family context can be affected by care giving arrangements. Following parental care and daycare, grandparents are the third most important care givers for children in many Western societies. Despite the relevance of grandparental care, there is little evidence on the causal effects of this care mode on the next generations' health and well‐being. In this paper, we fill this gap by investigating the causal impact of regular grandparental care on the self‐reported health and (domain‐specific) satisfaction of both parents and children. To do so, we exploit geographic distance to grandparents as a source of arguably exogenous variation and use representative German panel data for families with children under the age of 11. Our results suggest positive effects on parental satisfaction with the child care situation, as well as mothers' satisfaction with their leisure time. However, we also find negative effects on children's health, particularly for elementary school aged children and for boys.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：家庭环境中的健康和幸福感可能受到照顾安排的影响。在许多西方社会中，祖父母是继父母照顾和日托之后的第三大儿童照顾者。尽管祖父母照顾的重要性，但关于这种照顾方式对下一代健康和幸福感的因果效应的证据很少。本文通过研究定期祖父母照顾对父母和儿童自报健康和（特定领域）满意度的因果影响，填补了这一空白。为此，我们利用与祖父母之间的地理距离作为外生变化的来源，并使用代表德国家庭的面板数据，这些家庭的孩子年龄在11岁以下。我们的研究结果表明，祖父母照顾对父母对儿童照顾情况的满意度以及母亲对休闲时间的满意度有积极影响。然而，我们也发现对儿童健康有负面影响，特别是对小学生和男孩。

papers.title_en: EQ-5D(-Y) Valuation from Adult and Child Perspectives: Where Does the Empirical Evidence Leave Us and How Should We Proceed?
papers.title_zh: EQ-5D(-Y) 成人与儿童视角下的评估：实证证据将我们引向何方，我们应如何进行？
papers.abstract_en: Valuing pediatric health-related quality of life (HRQOL) is essential for economic evaluations in child healthcare. Instruments like EQ-5D-Y were developed for this purpose. A key methodological innovation-though controversial-has been the use of the child perspective for valuation of EQ-5D-Y health states, where adults value health states imagining a 10-year-old child. This paper critically reviews empirical findings on this approach, examines potential biases, assesses alignment with stakeholder views, and explores alternatives. We relied on a targeted review of empirical literature, including studies comparing adults valuing their own health (adult perspective) and using child perspectives, as well as stakeholder opinion studies. Findings were synthesized into ten key learnings: (1) Child-perspective valuations are typically higher than adult ones for the same health states. (2) Adults prioritize pain/discomfort and being sad/unhappy differently for children. (3) Child age has minimal impact. Mechanisms contributing to differences between adult and child perspectives include (4) discomfort with child death, (5) different valuations of life duration, (6) psychological distance, (7) emotional difficulty deciding for others, and (8) external goals influencing results. Stakeholder engagement shows that (9) the effects of using child perspectives do not align well with societal preferences, and (10) stakeholders express a preference for approaches that directly involve children and adolescents in valuation tasks. We conclude that relying on child perspectives may introduce systematic biases, potentially undermining the validity of pediatric health utilities. A re-evaluation of current valuation methods for EQ-5D-Y may be warranted, with greater consideration for direct child involvement, mapping techniques, and group-based deliberative approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 评估儿童健康相关的生活质量（HRQOL）对于儿童医疗保健的经济评估至关重要。为此目的开发了EQ-5D-Y等工具。一个关键的方法论创新——尽管有争议——是使用儿童视角对EQ-5D-Y健康状况进行估值，即成年人在想象一个10岁儿童时对健康状况进行估值。本文批判性地回顾了这种方法的经验性发现，检查了潜在的偏见，评估了与利益相关者观点的一致性，并探索了替代方案。我们依赖于对实证文献的针对性审查，包括比较成年人评估自己健康（成人视角）和使用儿童视角的研究，以及利益相关者意见研究。研究结果综合为十个关键教训：（1）儿童视角的估值通常高于成人对相同健康状况的估值。（2）成年人对儿童的疼痛/不适和悲伤/不快乐有不同的优先级。（3）儿童年龄影响最小。导致成人和儿童视角差异的机制包括（4）对儿童死亡的不适，（5）对生命持续时间的不同估值，（6）心理距离，（7）为他人做决定时的情感困难，以及（8）影响结果的外部目标。利益相关者参与表明（9）使用儿童视角的效果与社会偏好不一致，（10）利益相关者表示更倾向于直接涉及儿童和青少年参与估值任务的方法。我们得出结论，依赖儿童视角可能会引入系统性偏见，可能破坏儿童健康效用的效度。可能需要重新评估EQ-5D-Y当前的估值方法，更多考虑直接儿童参与、映射技术和基于群体的审议方法。

papers.title_en: The Importance of Structured Expert Elicitation to Inform Outcomes Following Treatment Discontinuation: Evidence Assessment Group Perspective
papers.title_zh: 结构化专家征询在治疗中断后结果信息中的重要性：证据评估小组视角

papers.title_en: Practical Considerations for Incorporating Equity More Explicitly in Australian Health Technology Assessment Processes
papers.title_zh: 在澳大利亚卫生技术评估过程中更明确地纳入公平性的实用考虑

papers.title_en: Should Early-Stage NIH Funding Influence Pharmaceutical Drug Pricing?
papers.title_zh: 早期NIH资助是否应影响药品定价？

papers.title_en: What Costs and Benefits Should be Counted in Health Technology Assessments and Guidelines? The NICE Perspective
papers.title_zh: 健康技术评估和指南中应考虑哪些成本和效益？NICE的观点

papers.title_en: Mapping Methodologies for Economic Evaluation of Digital Health Technologies: A Scoping Review
papers.title_zh: 数字健康技术经济评价的映射方法：范围综述
papers.abstract_en: Current frameworks lack standardization and are not fully adapted to the characteristics of DHTs. Future development should prioritize flexible, lifecycle-aligned evaluation models and standardized guidance to support evidence-based digital health decision making.
papers.abstract_zh: 当前框架缺乏标准化，并未完全适应分布式哈希表（DHTs）的特点。未来的发展应优先考虑灵活的、与生命周期对齐的评估模型和标准化指导，以支持基于证据的数字健康决策。

papers.title_en: Preferences for Adopting Artificial Intelligence in Radiation Therapy Treatment: A Discrete Choice Experiment
papers.title_zh: 标题：在放射治疗中采用人工智能的偏好：一项离散选择实验
papers.abstract_en: This study provides important information about Australian general public preferences for AI in treatment planning and can be used to inform future research on economic evaluations and implementation of AI-driven technologies in radiation therapy.
papers.abstract_zh: 本研究提供了有关澳大利亚公众对人工智能在治疗计划中的偏好的重要信息，可用于指导未来关于经济评估和实施放射治疗中人工智能驱动技术的研究。

papers.title_en: EQ-5D-5L in Multiple Sclerosis: Estimated Utility Values, Minimal (Clinically) Important Changes, and Direct and Indirect Influences Over Time
papers.title_zh: EQ-5D-5L在多发性硬化症中的应用：估算效用值、最小（临床）重要变化及随时间的直接和间接影响
papers.abstract_en: Health utility values for MS were consistently lower than those found in the English population and were influenced by factors amenable to clinical intervention. Anchor-based MIC varied by subtype and relapse history, showing that when assessing the significance of changing health status from the perspective of those with MS, a uniform MIC should not be used.
papers.abstract_zh: 多发性硬化症（MS）的健康效用值始终低于英国人口中发现的值，并且受到可以临床干预的因素影响。基于锚点的最小重要变化（MIC）因亚型和复发史而异，表明在从MS患者的角度评估健康状况变化的重要性时，不应使用统一的MIC。

papers.title_en: SSDI Beneficiaries Had Elevated Mortality During The 2-Year Waiting Period For Medicare, 2000–21
papers.title_zh: 标题： 2000-2021年，社会保障残疾保险受益人在等待医疗保险的2年期间死亡率较高
papers.abstract_en: Most Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) beneficiaries face a mandatory two-year waiting period for Medicare eligibility. Because of concerns that lack of health coverage during the waiting period could have life-threatening consequences for some beneficiaries, selected subpopulations are exempt from the waiting period. In 2025, legislation was introduced in Congress to expand the scope of these exemptions. However, there is limited empirical evidence on the twenty-four-month mortality rate of the SSDI beneficiary population, how it compares with that of the general population, how it varies by age and primary impairment, and how it has changed over time. Using 2000-19 Social Security Administration data, we provide a descriptive analysis of mortality rates during the Medicare waiting period. In 2019, the twenty-four-month mortality rate of SSDI beneficiaries was 5.96 percent, whereas the adjusted rate in the general population was 1.25 percent. The mortality rate was highest among beneficiaries with neoplasms, at 39.3 percent. The twenty-four-month mortality rate of SSDI beneficiaries has risen since 2011, reflecting changes in the demographic and impairment characteristics of new beneficiaries. These findings demonstrate the SSDI population's vulnerability and can inform policy conversations about expanding the scope of exemptions from the Medicare waiting period.
papers.abstract_zh: 大多数社会保障残疾保险（SSDI）受益人面临为期两年的强制等待期，才有资格获得医疗保险。由于担心等待期间缺乏健康保险可能对一些受益人造成生命威胁，特定子群体被免除等待期。2025年，国会引入了立法以扩大这些豁免的范围。然而，关于SSDI受益人群二十四个月死亡率的经验证据有限，包括其与普通人群死亡率的比较、如何因年龄和主要残疾而异，以及随时间的变化情况。利用2000-2019年社会保障管理局的数据，我们提供了在医疗保险等待期间的死亡率描述性分析。2019年，SSDI受益人的二十四个月死亡率为5.96%，而普通人群的调整率为1.25%。在患有肿瘤的受益人中，死亡率最高，达到39.3%。自2011年以来，SSDI受益人的二十四个月死亡率上升，反映了新受益人的人口统计和残疾特征的变化。这些发现显示了SSDI人群的脆弱性，并可以为扩大豁免医疗保险等待期范围的政策讨论提供信息。

papers.title_en: Rapid Disenrollment Rates Tripled For Medicare Advantage Beneficiaries, 2017–22
papers.title_zh: 2017-22年，医保优势受益人快速退保率增长三倍
papers.abstract_en: Rapid disenrollment, when a beneficiary disenrolls from a new Medicare Advantage (MA) plan within the first three months of the calendar year, could signal enrollees' immediate dissatisfaction with their plan. The proportion of MA enrollees who rapidly disenrolled tripled from 3.5 percent in 2017 to 12.2 percent in 2022. We report on trends in rapid disenrollment to guide future actions.
papers.abstract_zh: 快速退保，即受益人在日历年的前三个月从新的医疗保险优势（MA）计划中退保，可能表明参保人对其计划的立即不满。从2017年的3.5%增加到2022年的12.2%，快速退保的MA参保人比例增加了三倍。我们报告快速退保的趋势，以指导未来的行动。

papers.title_en: Private Equity Acquisition Of Primary Care Practices: Modest Growth In Clinicians Offset By Increased Clinician Exits
papers.title_zh: 私募股权收购初级保健实践：临床医生的适度增长被增加的临床医生退出所抵消
papers.abstract_en: Private equity (PE) acquisition of primary care practices has raised questions about the effect on the clinician workforce, a key determinant of care continuity and access. We examined workforce changes after PE acquisition of 451 US primary care practices during the period 2018-22, using a difference-in-differences design with 2,241 matched independent control practices. Outcomes included the number of clinicians per practice and clinician exits, stratified by physician and advanced practice provider status. After acquisition, practices experienced a relative increase of 0.39 clinicians per practice, a 12.2 percent rise from the preacquisition mean of 3.2 clinicians per practice. Growth was observed for both the number of physicians (0.21) and the number of advanced practice providers (0.18). Exits increased by 0.22 clinicians per practice, largely driven by turnover among advanced practice providers. PE acquisition was associated with modest growth and higher advanced practice provider turnover, raising important questions about how ownership influences staffing dynamics in primary care, where workforce stability is critical to patient-centered delivery of care.
papers.abstract_zh: 私募股权（PE）对基础医疗实践的收购引发了关于对临床医生队伍影响的问题，后者是护理连续性和可及性的关键决定因素。我们使用差异-差异设计，以2,241个匹配的独立对照实践为基础，检查了2018-22年期间PE收购451个美国基础医疗实践后的工作队伍变化。结果包括每个实践的临床医生数量和临床医生退出，按医生和高级实践提供者身份分层。收购后，实践每个实践的临床医生数量相对增加了0.39人，比收购前平均每实践3.2名临床医生增加了12.2%。医生（0.21）和高级实践提供者（0.18）的数量都有所增长。退出的临床医生每个实践增加了0.22人，主要是由高级实践提供者的更替推动的。PE收购与适度增长和更高的高级实践提供者更替率相关，这引发了关于所有权如何影响基础医疗人员配置动态的重要问题，其中人员稳定性对以患者为中心的护理交付至关重要。

papers.title_en: Half Of Rural Patients Bypassed Their Local Hospital But Received Lower-Quality Surgical Care Elsewhere, 2016–20
papers.title_zh: 2016-2020年，一半农村患者绕过当地医院，但在其他地方接受的外科护理质量更低
papers.abstract_en: Hospital bypass, where patients receive care at a more distant hospital rather than their local hospital, has been described in the literature, but little is known about its association with surgical quality. Using data from the Medicare Provider Analysis and Review file and the American Hospital Association Annual Survey, we designed a retrospective cohort study of rural Medicare beneficiaries who underwent appendectomy, cholecystectomy, colectomy, or hernia repair during the period 2016-20, and we compared outcomes between those who bypassed their nearest surgery-capable hospital and those who did not, accounting for patient characteristics, hospital characteristics, and year of surgery. We found that 49 percent of rural beneficiaries bypassed their nearest surgery-capable hospital to receive surgical care elsewhere. Beneficiaries who bypassed had higher rates of in-hospital mortality, serious complications, and thirty-day readmissions, despite going to larger hospitals with more resources. Notably, these findings were preserved when we specifically analyzed both unplanned and elective admissions. These findings have important implications for surgical quality among rural patients and struggling rural hospitals, which may be able to alleviate some of their financial vulnerability by retaining larger proportions of these patients locally.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要： 文献中描述了医院绕过现象，即患者选择在更远的医院接受治疗而非当地医院，但关于其与手术质量的关联知之甚少。我们利用Medicare提供者分析和审查文件以及美国医院协会年度调查的数据，设计了一项回顾性队列研究，研究对象为2016-2020年间接受阑尾切除术、胆囊切除术、结肠切除术或疝气修复的农村Medicare受益人，比较了绕过最近手术能力医院与未绕过的患者之间的结果，同时考虑了患者特征、医院特征和手术年份。我们发现，49%的农村受益人绕过了最近的手术能力医院，到其他地方接受外科护理。尽管去了规模更大、资源更多的医院，但绕过的受益人院内死亡率、严重并发症和30天再入院率更高。值得注意的是，当我们特别分析了非计划和选择性入院时，这些发现仍然存在。这些发现对于农村患者的手术质量和挣扎中的农村医院具有重要意义，后者可能通过在当地保留更大比例的这些患者来减轻一些财务脆弱性。

papers.title_en: State Nursing Home Minimum Staffing Mandates: Increased Staff Levels, Minimal Impact On Finances And Closures, 2010–23
papers.title_zh: 标题： 国家养老院最低人员配置要求：2010-23年人员水平提高，对财务和关闭影响最小
papers.abstract_en: Higher levels of direct care staffing in nursing homes improve resident outcomes, yet concerns persist that minimum staffing mandates could strain facility finances or lead to closures. Using longitudinal data from the period 2010-23 on 6,849 nursing homes operating across twenty-two states, we estimated the effects of state minimum staffing mandates on staffing levels, financial health, and closures. Staffing mandates increased total direct care staff by 0.18 hours per resident day, or roughly 5 percent, on average, driven by increases in licensed practical nurses (0.06 hours per resident day) and certified nursing assistants (0.13 hours per resident day). Facilities' annual labor expenses rose by about $273,000, but these costs were offset by higher net patient revenues (approximately $546,000), leaving net margins unchanged. Mandates did not increase the likelihood of facility closure. Overall, our findings indicate that minimum staffing mandates can meaningfully raise staffing levels without undermining the financial viability of nursing homes.
papers.abstract_zh: 护理院中更高水平的直接护理人员配置能够改善居民的护理结果，然而人们担心最低人员配置要求可能会给设施的财务带来压力或导致关闭。利用2010-2023年期间22个州6849家运营中的护理院的纵向数据，我们估计了州最低人员配置要求对人员配置水平、财务健康和关闭情况的影响。人员配置要求平均使每位居民每天的总直接护理人员时间增加了0.18小时，或大约5%，这一增长主要是由执业护士（每位居民每天增加0.06小时）和认证护理助理（每位居民每天增加0.13小时）的增加所驱动。设施的年度劳动费用增加了约273,000美元，但这些成本被更高的净患者收入（约546,000美元）所抵消，使得净利润率保持不变。要求并未增加设施关闭的可能性。总体而言，我们的发现表明，最低人员配置要求可以在不损害护理院财务可行性的情况下，显著提高人员配置水平。

papers.title_en: Practice Pattern Changes After Adoption Of Diagnostic AI Tool Used In Conjunction With Cardiac Imaging
papers.title_zh: 诊断人工智能工具与心脏成像联合使用后实践模式的变化
papers.abstract_en: In 2018, Medicare established coverage and reimbursement for its first service using artificial intelligence (AI): computed tomography (CT) fractional flow reserve (FFR<sub>CT</sub>). FFR<sub>CT</sub> is used in conjunction with cardiac imaging to diagnose coronary artery disease. Medicare reimbursement provides the opportunity to observe clinicians' adoption of FFR<sub>CT</sub> and examine changes in utilization, spending, clinician productivity, and patient outcomes associated with its use. In this study, we exploited variation in the timing of FFR<sub>CT</sub> adoption by clinicians, quantifying changes in practice patterns before and after adoption compared with nonadopters. We found that use of the underlying coronary artery disease test required for FFR<sub>CT</sub> increased after the adoption of FFR<sub>CT</sub>, whereas invasive test use declined. On net, per patient diagnostic spending for coronary artery disease increased. We found no evidence that adopting FFR<sub>CT</sub> facilitated earlier diagnosis of coronary artery disease, although clinicians saw a larger share of patients with coronary artery disease after adoption, and clinician productivity (that is, total visit count) increased. After clinicians adopted FFR<sub>CT</sub>, we observed a decrease in rates of cardiac-related adverse events among their patients.
papers.abstract_zh: 2018年，医疗保险首次为使用人工智能（AI）的服务建立了覆盖和报销：计算机断层扫描（CT）分数流量储备（FFR<sub>CT</sub>）。FFR<sub>CT</sub>与心脏成像一起使用，以诊断冠状动脉疾病。医疗保险报销提供了观察临床医生采用FFR<sub>CT</sub>的机会，并检查与其使用相关的使用、支出、临床医生生产力和患者结果的变化。在这项研究中，我们利用了临床医生采用FFR<sub>CT</sub>的时间变化，量化了采用前后与非采用者相比的实践模式的变化。我们发现，在采用FFR<sub>CT</sub>之后，需要进行FFR<sub>CT</sub>的潜在冠状动脉疾病测试的使用增加了，而侵入性测试的使用下降了。总的来说，每位患者的冠状动脉疾病诊断支出增加了。我们没有发现采用FFR<sub>CT</sub>有助于更早地诊断冠状动脉疾病的证据，尽管临床医生在采用后看到了更大比例的冠状动脉疾病患者，并且临床医生的生产力（即总访问次数）增加了。在临床医生采用FFR<sub>CT</sub>后，我们观察到他们患者中与心脏相关的不良事件的比率有所下降。

papers.title_en: List Price Reductions Among Brand-Name ICS-LABA Inhalers In 2024 Were Associated With Increased Generic Uptake
papers.title_zh: 2024年品牌名ICS-LABA吸入剂的定价降低与仿制药使用增加相关
papers.abstract_en: Inhaled corticosteroid-long-acting beta-agonist (ICS-LABA) inhalers are widely prescribed for asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease. ICS-LABAs are largely interchangeable within the class; however, the use of brand-name versions has remained high in the US even though generic versions have been marketed since 2017. Effective in January 2024, the American Rescue Plan Act of 2021 imposed new penalties for prior list price increases in Medicaid, prompting manufacturers of some ICS-LABAs to reduce list prices for these drugs. In an interrupted time series analysis, we used US nationwide prescription dispensing data to assess changes in generic uptake of ICS-LABAs after the brand-name list price reductions. Use of generic ICS-LABAs increased by 23 percentage points at the start of 2024, driven by changes in commercial plans (33 percentage points) and Medicare (24 percentage points). List price reductions may have limited the capacity for brand-name firms to offer large rebates to pharmacy benefit managers, blunting existing financial incentives that had favored brand-name over generic ICS-LABAs. These findings demonstrate how changes in list prices can promote generic competition and improve affordability for patients and payers.
papers.abstract_zh: 吸入性皮质类固醇-长效β2受体激动剂（ICS-LABA）吸入器被广泛用于哮喘和慢性阻塞性肺病的治疗。ICS-LABA在该类别内大部分可以互换；然而，即使自2017年以来已有仿制药上市，在美国使用品牌药版本的比例仍然很高。2024年1月生效的2021年美国救援计划法案对医疗补助计划中先前的清单价格增长施加了新的处罚，促使一些ICS-LABA制造商降低了这些药物的清单价格。在一项中断时间序列分析中，我们使用了美国全国范围内的处方配药数据，以评估品牌药清单价格降低后仿制药ICS-LABA的接受度变化。2024年初，仿制药ICS-LABA的使用增加了23个百分点，这一增长由商业计划（33个百分点）和医疗保险（24个百分点）的变化推动。清单价格降低可能限制了品牌药公司向药房福利管理者提供大额回扣的能力，削弱了现有的财务激励，这些激励曾有利于品牌药而非仿制药ICS-LABA。这些发现展示了清单价格变化如何促进仿制药竞争，改善患者和支付者的可负担性。
